gate: product surface stable (its packaging, or its body panels — whichever this product actually has)

worlds.name: Pixar 3D — Education Tier
worlds.one_liner: Pixar's appeal-driven shape language: subsurface-scatter skin, squash-stretch physics with follow-through, art-directed warm-key + complementary-bounce — every material reads tactile before it reads rendered.
worlds.render_law: Feature-animation 3D CGI in the Pixar RenderMan / RenderMan-successor premium-CG feature-animation pipeline lineage (original subjects only). The Pixar signature is NOT 'cute 3D' — it is a specific formal grammar: appeal-driven silhouette design (shapes composed for emotional read at 50px thumbnail), subsurface scattering on character skin that carries the scene's light temperature (warm honey SSS under tungsten, cool ivory SSS under daylight, amber-bronze SSS under sodium), wet dual-point specular on eyes with painted-in iris depth, and physically-motivated bounce fill. Every prop has a deliberate overscale factor (10-15%) for child-safe readability — a pencil is thumb-width, a bowl is head-width. Material specificity is non-negotiable: wood shows visible grain with satin-varnish sheen, fabric shows woven stitch texture and slight fiber fray at edges, metal shows anisotropic brushed highlight, rubber has soft-diffuse sheen with slight translucency at thin edges. Lighting grammar is art-directed, not photo-random: single motivated key (window sun at 45°, practical lamp at 60°, monitor glow from below), complementary bounce fill at 25-35% intensity in the key's opposing hue, rim accent in palette's saturated accent color, painted soft ambient occlusion in corner and fold pockets — never hard-black shadow. Composition: character at focal plane sharp at f/4 equivalent, background falling into gentle focus falloff. Squash-stretch physics govern all character and prop motion: every pickup has anticipation, every landing has squash, every fast move has follow-through smear. IMPERATIVE: FULL 3D CGI FEATURE-ANIMATION RENDER — continuous physically-based shading, painterly AO, SSS skin. Strictly forbid 2D cel shading, hard black outlines, flat graphic fill, clay/plasticine surface texture on character skin.
worlds.line_grammar: No outlines — silhouette reads entirely through lighting rim and value separation. Shadow edges are soft, never hard-step. Ambient occlusion painted in, never raytraced-hard. The shape carries via appeal geometry, not line.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35mm to 50mm equivalent focal length. f/4 on mid-shots, f/2.8 on character close-up, f/5.6 on environment establisher. Vision3 250D color science: neutral-warm film curve with fine grain (16mm-equivalent grain floor, mostly in shadow). Gentle racks on focal plane shifts. No lens flare unless motivated by a visible practical light source in frame. No anamorphic streak.
worlds.camera_grammar: Frame at the height of whoever the story belongs to — a child's eye-line, a creature's, an object's — never a neutral adult observer looking down at it. Stage in real depth: a soft foreground element anchors the near plane, the dominant element reads sharp in the mid, the world falls away behind. Moves are gentle and motivated: a slow push at a beat of understanding, a lateral dolly that lets an existing edge pass as parallax, a rack that hands the eye from one plane to the next. Never a whip pan, never a handheld shake, never a lens flare the frame does not physically justify.
worlds.light_law: Single motivated key from a real-world source visible or strongly implied in frame (window sun, desk lamp, overhead classroom fluorescent, screen glow). Complementary bounce fill at 25-35% key intensity, in the key's opposing hue temperature — warm key produces cool-violet bounce, cool daylight key produces warm-honey bounce. Rim accent in the palette's saturated accent tone. Painted soft AO in corner pockets, floor-join, and fabric folds — ambient shadow reads warm-dark, never cold-black.

palette_lock.bias: warm-honey SSS dominant on skin; complementary cool-violet bounce in shadow; wood tones in brown-ochre range with satin sheen; fabric in warm-saturated primaries with fiber texture. NO acid green, NO neon, NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO desaturated grey anywhere in character or environment.

worlds.motion_cadence: Squash-stretch physics on every character and prop action: anticipation wind-up, peak action with directional smear, follow-through overshoot, settle with secondary motion. Emotional hold: 12-18 frames on a significant look before the cut. Eye darts before the action — character looks where the action will happen 3-4 frames ahead. Prop pickups have moment-of-contact squash. Walk cycles show weight: pelvis dips on each step, shoulder counter-rotates. 24fps cadence.
negative_lock: NO Woody, NO Buzz, NO Elsa, NO Anna, NO Moana, NO Bing Bong, NO Merida, NO Wall-E, NO any named Pixar or Disney animated character
NO Radiator Springs, NO Monstropolis, NO Arendelle, NO Pixar City, NO any named Pixar/Disney location
NO clay or plasticine character skin — skin MUST be Pixar SSS-shaded, not clay (clay is only a prop material if the clay_hamur material is active)
NO hard cel shading, NO cartoon black outline, NO anime-style eye geometry
NO flat graphic fill, NO toon shader, NO 2D illustration style on 3D forms
NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO desaturated look, NO high-contrast noir
Turkish label only — blocky dimensional letterform, raised and legible, NO English signage
NO octane-render aesthetic (avoid: harsh physical sky, raw caustics, overly sharp AO)
worlds.example_injection: Feature-animation 3D CGI frame in the Pixar RenderMan feature-animation pipeline. Single motivated key: warm window sun from camera-right at 45°, cool-violet complementary bounce from left at 30% intensity, tangerine-amber rim accent from low right. Focal plane at f/4: Mamilas character mid-shot, appeal-rounded silhouette, SSS skin reading honey-warm under the tungsten key, dual-point wet eye spec, soft painted AO under the chin. Props: wooden classroom desk shows brown-ochre grain with satin varnish sheen, a thick primary-red pencil (15% overscale) resting diagonally. Character posing: squash landing into the seat, follow-through in the shoulders still settling. Background: soft f/4 falloff onto a warm classroom wall with chalkboard — painted AO in the corner join. Turkish label 'ALTI' as a blocky raised wooden numeral on the desk edge, legible from frame edge. Motion seed: one frame before the character's hand closes around the pencil — anticipation micro-pullback visible. AVOID: Woody, Buzz, Pixar franchise names, clay skin on character, cel outline, teal-orange grade, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Paper Craft Pop-Up
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal macro miniature: a pop-up storybook page opening toward camera, every element die-cut cardstock assembled by tab-and-slot, real physical depth in perpendicular paper layers, fiber catching raking light at every cut edge.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal macro miniature paper-craft diorama — a pop-up storybook page opening flat toward camera. (1) MATERIAL: every element is die-cut cardstock (100-250gsm equivalent, visible fiber) assembled via tab-and-slot mechanisms, hinge folds and stacked layers; every prop is paper — characters, buildings, math tiles, arrows, plants — no clay, no plastic, no fabric. (2) EDGE + GRAIN: paper grain visible at raking light; cut edges show mild fiber tear at the knife stroke. (3) DEPTH: real physical depth — 2-4 layers of paper standing perpendicular to the page — never a painted illusion; the depth of field betrays the true miniature scale. (4) FOLD SHADOW: soft ambient-warm dark under folds, never black; warm bounce fill from below simulates page-glow. (5) LIGHT: warm 3200K key raking oblique to wake the fiber, a cool 5600K rim behind paper edges to backlight and halate the fiber. (6) CAMERA: low-angle side dolly or macro overhead, shallow DOF (f/2.8 macro equivalent) isolating the mechanism. IMPERATIVE: PHOTOREAL MACRO MINIATURE — real paper fiber, real cut edges, true macro depth of field. Forbid 2D cel shading, flat digital illustration, smooth full-CGI plastic surfaces, and any non-paper material on the built elements.
worlds.line_grammar: No drawn lines. Silhouettes carry via the crisp die-cut paper edge; interior detail is layered paper collage — shape on shape, never a printed line. Letters are raised die-cut cardstock, not printed type.
worlds.lens_grammar: 50-100mm macro. f/2.8-f/4 shallow DOF isolating the mechanism and betraying the miniature scale. Warm tungsten grade (3200K key). Mild 16mm-equivalent film grain. Slight barrel distortion allowed at the 50mm macro end.
worlds.camera_grammar: Shoot it like a real macro table: 50-100mm close, the mechanism isolated in shallow focus while the set falls away and betrays its miniature scale. The page opens TOWARD camera — favour a near-frontal vantage that lets a fold, a tab or a die-cut edge read as depth, and a slow creep in as the mechanism completes. One move per shot, hand-scale and unhurried. Never a wide establishing vantage that flattens the pop-up, never a top-down flat-lay, never an interior vantage inside the paper, never a whip pan.
worlds.light_law: Warm key from an oblique angle to rake the paper texture. Cool backlight from behind the paper edges for fiber halation. Bounce fill from an off-white foam-core equivalent. Shadow pockets under folds ambient-warm, never black.

palette_lock.bias: cream-kraft-terracotta dominant — warm paper-fiber tones catching the tungsten key, with construction-paper primary accents (crimson, cobalt, ochre) allowed where a beat needs a color pop. Shadow is warm paper-brown, never neutral-grey. NO neon, NO pastel-mint, NO cool digital white, NO CG plastic sheen.

worlds.motion_cadence: Slow deliberate mechanical motion — a tab slides in its slot, a page flap folds, a pop-up rises; every motion has a visible physical constraint. Hold 1.5-2s on the rest position, the fiber settling.
negative_lock: NO CGI 3D characters — all figures are built paper
NO Pixar-style bevel or subsurface skin
NO printed line-art on the paper — only cut shapes
NO fabric, NO clay, NO wood, NO plastic — paper only
NO named children's-book character (Curious George, Peter Rabbit, etc.)
NO 3D render, NO octane, NO realistic subsurface shading, NO 2.5D plastic look
Turkish label only — letters are raised die-cut paper, not printed, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal paper-craft pop-up diorama, low side dolly along the bottom page edge. A pop-up page lies open like a tiny room: a Mamilas paper figure (die-cut cardstock, tab-and-slot) stands mid-scene, with a folded paper element anchored at lower right and another at lower left, a narrow die-cut paper route line running between them. Warm 3200K low-sun key from the right strongly rakes the right corner; cool backlight halates the paper edges. Exactly one tactile note: clean cut-paper laminations show fiber at the corner tears. Turkish labels raised as die-cut cardstock words: 'BAŞLA' right, 'SON' left. Motion seed: the left flap one frame before folding shut. AVOID: CGI skin, English labels, printed line-art, warped Turkish letters, non-paper materials. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Studio Ghibli — Hayao Miyazaki
worlds.one_liner: Miyazaki's hand-painted grammar: sculptural cumulus masses with modeled grey-violet undersides rule the upper two-thirds of frame; wind is a visible actor; a lovingly hand-crafted machine stands in silhouette against the living landscape.
worlds.render_law: Traditional 2D animation frame in the Hayao Miyazaki lineage of pastoral hand-painted theatrical features — grammar from the late-80s through 90s Toho/Tokuma production era of hand-painted pastoral theatrical features. Character key is hand-inked at 2-3px, confident and uninterrupted, tapered at the very ends, dark-warm-brown (never pure black) — the line breathes with the character's anatomy without being a blueprint. Fills are flat cel in 2-3 value steps with matte finish. Backgrounds are watercolor and gouache over pencil-ruled layout: visible brush marks, wet-into-wet bleeds at foliage edges, paper tooth catching raking light as micro-texture across the painted surface; foliage is painted as clustered brush-stroke masses, not leaf-by-leaf. The three Miyazaki-specific signatures that a true expert checks for: (1) CLOUDS — painted as sculptural solid masses with fully modeled undersides showing grey-violet shadow and cream-lit tops — sky architecture with physical weight, not backdrop decoration. Sky plus nature field claims the majority of the frame while the character holds the lower quarter. (2) WIND — a visible actor at all times: grass bends in a slow coordinated wave, hair and cloth lift in 8-frame loop cycles, seeds or petals carry laterally. (3) HAND-CRAFTED MACHINE — a lovingly drawn fictional mechanical device stands in silhouette dialogue against the living landscape — wooden flying rig, copper water wheel, iron locomotive, cast-brass clockwork — always fictional, always at human scale, always in silhouette at sky edge. Additional markers: dust motes float in god-ray shafts through interior spaces; food is drawn with glossy appetite specificity (steam curls, condensation on glass, butter sheen on bread); children move with true body-weight lean into effort; the pace has ma — the deliberate breathing pause of held composition before motion resumes. Character cel values are chosen to sit visually inside the painted background, never on top of it. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL over painted watercolor-gouache backgrounds. Forbid 3D forms, CGI shading, gradient airbrush cel, neon color.
worlds.line_grammar: Hand-inked line 2-3px, confident, uninterrupted, tapered at both ends. Color is dark-warm-brown, not pure black. Interior fold lines appear only where anatomy demands — shoulder joint, knee fold, collar fall — and they are thinner (1.5px equivalent) than the outline. Background has NO outlines — painted edge and value separation only. Effects (water, fire, wind) have loose, calligraphic brush-stroke contour that matches the background's brush energy.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat 2D composition — no physical lens DOF or flare. Simulated 'depth' via painted atmospheric perspective: far objects lose saturation and gain blue-grey aerial haze, never blurred. Paper grain overlay subtle across whole frame. 4:3 or 1.85:1 aspect. Colour space: slightly warm-shifted, film-print feel (Fuji stock aesthetic — slightly less saturated than pure digital, slightly warm highlights).
worlds.camera_grammar: Stage in flat painted layers and let stillness carry the meaning: a wide that gives the world room to exist, a held frame where wind and light do the moving. Depth is painted, not focused — near, middle and far read by atmospheric haze, never by blur. One unhurried move per shot at most: a gentle lateral pan across the landscape, a slow rise, a patient hold on a face. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never a top-down vantage, never a human vantage.
worlds.light_law: Motivated natural light only — window shaft at golden hour, leaf-filtered dapple, lantern glow, moon. Shadow side receives warm ambient reflection (painted reflected sky, reflected earth tone), never grey or cool-neutral. God-ray dust motes when a light shaft is present — painted as individual small ovals, not a glow layer. Rim light on hair edges and grass blade tips. Interior scenes: warm tungsten practical motivates shadow direction; cool blue moonlight or blue-white snow light as opposite.

palette_lock.bias: sage-green + honey-cream + terracotta-red + sky-cobalt — Fuji-stock film warmth. Sky cobalt to cream-white in cumulus gradient. Shadow warm-brown, not neutral-grey. NO neon, NO teal-orange Hollywood grade, NO pure desaturated grey, NO acid-bright primary.

worlds.motion_cadence: 8-frame wind cycles: grass, hair, cloth all move in coordinated lateral drift, same timing. Ma pause: after a significant action, character holds completely still 24-36 frames — the world keeps breathing (wind, dust, drifting leaves) while the character is still. Breath cycle on character 24 frames (visible chest rise, nostril micro-flare). Walk cycle at 12fps limited animation feel — arms swinging with counter-rotation, body-weight lean slightly forward into effort. Eye blink at natural interval (every 90-150 frames).
negative_lock: NO Totoro, NO Chihiro, NO Kiki, NO Ponyo, NO Howl, NO Ashitaka, NO San, NO Nausicaa, NO any named Ghibli character
NO Spirit World bathhouse, NO Cat Bus, NO Spirited Away train, NO Valley of the Wind, NO any named Ghibli location
NO CGI shading on any element, NO 3D bevel, NO cel-shaded 3D render
NO neon color, NO Hollywood teal-orange grade, NO digital-clean gradient
NO airbrush gradient fill on character cel (flat matte 2-3 value only)
Wind MUST be present and directional — NO windless static composition
Sky MUST carry sculptural cumulus with modeled underside — NO empty flat blue sky
Turkish label only — ink brush-lettering style integrated into the environment, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Hand-drawn 2D frame in the Hayao Miyazaki lineage. Mamilas character (dark-warm-brown 2-3px tapered line, warm honey cel skin, 3-value flat fill) stands small at lower-right third of a summer meadow — upper two-thirds is sky ruled by sculptural cumulus masses, cream-lit tops, grey-violet modeled undersides, painted wet-edge brush over paper tooth. Wind acting: sage-green grass masses bend in coordinated left-to-right 8-frame wave, character's cloth and hair lifted in same rhythm. At frame left, a fictional wooden flying rig with copper tube fittings stands in silhouette against the valley — no brand, no canon IP, human-scale. God-ray shaft from cloud gap hits the rig's right spar; dust motes as individual painted ovals in the shaft. Warm afternoon amber light motivates shadow direction; reflected earth-green fills the shadow side warmly. Turkish label 'DOĞU' ink-brushed in brush-lettering style on a weathered wooden signpost. Ma seed: character fully still mid-exhale, 8 frames into the wind cycle, cloth lifting, rig trembling on the threshold of catching the wind. AVOID: Totoro, Chihiro, Cat Bus, bathhouse, CGI shading, flat blue sky, windless frame, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Arcane — Fortiche Painterly-3D
worlds.one_liner: Fortiche's painterly-3D hybrid: 3D-modeled forms surface-shaded with visible oil-paint brush stroke at every silhouette edge — no black anywhere, shadow-side is deep violet, painted highlights that ignore physical light math.
worlds.render_law: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid rendering as developed by Fortiche Production for premium episodic animation. This is a precise formal system, not 'anime-ish' — the grammar is industrial European painterly, not Japanese: (1) FORMS: full 3D geometry, but surface shading is a painted oil-texture layer — brush strokes are visible at every silhouette edge, their direction following the form's curvature but inconsistently, as if a painter made deliberate choices rather than a renderer solving physics. (2) COLOUR LAW: there is no black anywhere in this world. The deepest shadow is a rich deep violet. Skin shadow is rosewood-plum, architectural shadow is indigo-violet, cloth shadow is aubergine. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: painted-in manually, NOT following physical light math exactly — highlight placement emphasizes the emotional reading of the form (the cheekbone lit even when key is behind the subject, the knuckle catching a gleam on the swing). (4) SURFACE SPECIFICITY: skin has painted-in blush and pore mark visible at close-up, not subsurface scattering. Hair reads as sculpted painted volume — individual strands are grouped into painted clumps, each clump receiving a single highlight stroke. Fabric shows woven texture painted, not cloth-sim. (5) ENVIRONMENT: chunky mid-poly architecture with surface painting of grime strata, rust oxidation pattern, and iridescent oil-slick streaks on wet stone — a deep-industrial undercity aesthetic of chemical-district grime, never any named franchise district. Every metal surface carries thin-film interference rainbow spec. Background compresses into painterly matte with visible brushwork — never crisp photographic detail, never clean CGI surface. (6) POST: Vision3 500T film stock emulation — warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve, halation blooming on any pixel above 90% luminance (light sources bloom into surrounding haze), subtle chromatic aberration at high-contrast silhouette edges, 35mm-equivalent grain floor present but refined. IMPERATIVE: FORTICHE PAINTERLY-3D HYBRID. 3D forms with hand-painted surface shading, 2D-animated FX layer on top. FORBID: flat cel shading, clean untextured CGI, photoreal live-action light math, standard anime eye geometry, pure black.
worlds.line_grammar: No hard cel outline anywhere. Silhouette carries entirely through painted edge — the brush stroke itself IS the boundary, weight varies from 2px at low emotional intensity to 5px at high, direction follows the form. Interior 'lines' are painted shadow steps: a steep value jump that reads as line at distance but resolves to brushwork at close. Shadow-side rim is painted deep violet, not inked. Effects layer (energy, fire, sparks) has its own distinct loose calligraphic brush contour that contrasts with the controlled character silhouette.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35mm to 50mm portrait range. f/2.8 character close-up, f/4 mid-shot, f/5.6 wide establisher. Vision3 500T characteristic curve: warm highlight (+15 orange shift above 70% luminance), cool shadow (cyan push below 30%), halation blooming on anything above 90% luminance. 35mm grain floor present and refined. Mild chromatic aberration (1-2px lateral shift at silhouette). No anamorphic streak. 1.78:1 or 2.00:1 aspect.
worlds.camera_grammar: 35-50mm portrait staging with a painted 3D weight: the character close-up carved out of a deep, softly falling background. The camera commits to one bold, deliberate move — a slow push onto the decisive gesture, a lateral track through the layers — then holds while the paint settles. Frame at the character's own height; the world is dense around them, never above them. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Single motivated key direction — warm industrial lantern, cool exterior moon, neon-adjacent accent from a painted window. Bounce fill is in the key's complementary hue from the palette: magenta key bounces teal fill, teal key bounces magenta fill. Rim accent color is always from the palette's jewel-tone (never white, never warm neutral). Ambient occlusion is painted soft and warm-dark, never a hard black AO contact shadow. Halation blooms on all practical sources in frame. Painted indirect-light from windows and lamps bleeds warm halos onto proximate geometry.

palette_lock.bias: deep-violet shadow + jewel-teal mid + magenta-pink accent + warm-cream highlight. Thin-film rainbow spec on all metal. Grime palette: rust-orange, oxidized copper, oil-slick iridescent (context-dependent). NO earth green, NO primary red, NO pure orange (flame accent only, single instance), NO black anywhere in the frame, NO standard-anime flat cel color.

worlds.motion_cadence: Deliberate 24fps with hand-animated painted smear frames at peak action — 2-3 consecutive frames with painted directional motion streak visible as brushwork, not motion-blur. 1.5-2 second hold on emotional beat — character studies the situation, eyes tracking. Slow-in / slow-out weight. Momentum carries: a punch's aftershock ripples through cloth and hair for 4-6 frames after impact. No motion blur — smears are painted.
negative_lock: NO Jinx, NO Vi, NO Caitlyn, NO Jayce, NO Viktor, NO Silco, NO Ekko, NO Heimerdinger, NO Vander, NO Powder, NO any named Arcane character
NO Piltover, NO Zaun, NO Undercity, NO Hexgate, NO The Last Drop, NO Piltover Academy, NO any named Arcane location
NO Hextech crystal (blue glowing gem device), NO shimmer substance (iridescent purple glow serum)
NO pure black anywhere in the frame — deepest shadow is deep violet
NO hard cel outline, NO standard anime flat-color shading
NO earth green, NO pure orange (flame accent excepted), NO sepia-brown palette
NOT anime — this is European industrial painterly, NOT Japanese animation grammar
Turkish label only — hand-painted brush lettering with visible uneven stroke edge, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Fortiche painterly-3D hybrid frame in their episodic production grammar. Oil-paint texture on every surface, brush stroke visible at silhouette. Subject: Mamilas character mid-close-up — painted-blush skin at cool rosewood midtone under a teal practical key, shadow side deep violet (no black), painted cheekbone highlight that slightly exceeds physical expectation, magenta rim from camera-right. Hair: sculpted painted volume, clumps with individual painted highlight strokes. Background: chunky mid-poly rooftop geometry surface-painted with rust oxidation and iridescent oil-streak on rain-wet stone, warm lantern-bloom halation in mid-ground, teal night sky with painted-in stars, Vision3 500T warm-highlight / cool-shadow curve visible in grade. Chromatic aberration 1px at rim-light silhouette edge. Turkish label 'KUZEY' hand-painted on rusted iron: uneven stroke edges, slight impasto build. Motion seed: eye flicking toward off-camera sound — painted iris smear, 2 frames wide, directional. AVOID: Jinx, Hextech crystal, Piltover, black shadow, cel outline, earth green, anime flat color, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Spider-Verse — Sony Pictures Animation
worlds.one_liner: Sony's print-hybrid: 3D forms wearing Ben-Day halftone skin, line layer mis-registered 1-2px off the color plate, hero on 12fps 2s while the camera runs 24fps — the comic page is literally moving.
worlds.render_law: Sony Pictures Animation print-hybrid comic-book frame — the founding grammar of their print-hybrid feature pipeline, a precise print-emulation system and NOT 'stylized 3D'. (1) FORMS: full 3D-modeled geometry, but every flat-shaded color fill is overprinted with Ben-Day halftone dots whose size scales with depth — fine dots on the face, coarse dots on the far background, so the halftone itself reads distance. (2) PRINT MIS-REGISTRATION: the color plate sits 1-2px offset from the black line layer, exactly like a cheap comic that slipped on the press — strongest at panel edges, and cyan/magenta separate visibly at high-contrast silhouettes (2-4px chromatic split, read as ink mis-registration, never as a lens defect). (3) LINE: bold brush-textured black line 3-6px, weight HEAVIER on the shadow side of the form, ink texture and dry-brush skips visible — never a clean vector edge. (4) SHADING: hard cel steps, 3 values maximum, no gradient; a hatch or cross-hatch shadow can carry a form the way a comic inker would hatch it. (5) COMIC DEVICES are diegetic physics here: onomatopoeia words break INTO the frame as drawn objects, speed lines are graphic streaks (never motion blur), and an action-panel divider bar may slice the frame diagonally. (6) DUAL-CADENCE MOTION: the hero animates at 12fps on 2s holds while camera and environment run 24fps — this rate-clash is the single most recognizable print-hybrid signature. IMPERATIVE: PRINT-HYBRID — 3D forms fused with halftone comic printing. Forbid clean smooth CGI, plain flat cel with no dot texture, photoreal rendering, vector-clean line, motion-blur in place of drawn speed lines.
worlds.line_grammar: Bold brush-textured black line 3-6px, varied weight, thickening on the shadow side of each form; dry-brush ink skips and corner bleed visible. The color fill layer sits 1-2px off the line layer (press mis-registration). Interior detail is economical — a fold, a jaw plane — never fine-line rendering.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35-50mm treated as a comic panel frame. Cyan-magenta chromatic split 2-4px at high-contrast edges (mis-registration, a look choice not a defect). No lens flare unless drawn as a graphic star-burst. Depth stated by halftone dot scale and overlap as much as by focus.
worlds.camera_grammar: Frame as a comic panel: bold graphic staging, the vantage picked for how the SHAPE reads, foreshortened and unapologetic. The camera hits its composition and holds — a snap to the panel, an emphatic push, a held hero frame; the energy lives in the graphics, not in a drifting lens. A wide low hero angle or a steep drop are both permitted when the panel demands them. Never a handheld shake, never an interior vantage, never a human vantage, never a slow neutral documentary hold.
worlds.light_law: Bold motivated key from a single graphic direction. Fill is a hard-stepped complementary flat color, never a gradient wrap. Rim light becomes a flat graphic shape in the accent hue, not a specular falloff. Highlights are opaque graphic white shapes. Shadow is a printed dot-density field, not a soft ambient pool.

palette_lock.bias: high-saturation primary comic separation — deep violet shadow plate, saturated vermilion-red mid, electric-cyan accent, hot printed-yellow highlight. Halftone dots carry the mids; neon-bright accents allowed because this is print ink, not naturalistic light. NO earth tone, NO desaturated grade, NO gradient shading, NO teal-orange cinematic wash.

worlds.motion_cadence: Hero character 12fps on 2s holds; camera and background 24fps — dual-cadence is mandatory. Speed lines drawn as graphic streaks, never motion blur. Freeze-frame allowed at a peak beat. Onomatopoeia snaps in on the impact frame and holds 2-3 frames. Smear at peak action is a painted comic streak, not a blur.
negative_lock: NO Miles Morales, NO Peter Parker, NO Peter B. Parker, NO Gwen Stacy, NO Miguel O'Hara, NO Spider-Man 2099, NO Kingpin, NO Prowler, NO any named Spider-Verse character
NO Spider-Man suit pattern (red-blue web, black-red), NO web-shooter, NO spider emblem
NO recognizable New York landmark or skyline
NO clean vector line — brush texture and ink skip are mandatory
NO smooth naturalistic shading — 3 hard cel steps maximum
NO motion blur — speed and smear are drawn graphic devices
Turkish onomatopoeia only — PAT, ŞIK, VUM, GÜM in bold comic letters; NO English POW/BAM/ZAP
Turkish label only — bold comic letterform with drop shadow, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Sony print-hybrid comic-book frame. Halftone dots over flat color, line layer mis-registered 2px off the fills. Subject: Mamilas character on a rooftop mid-turn, 3-value cel shading, bold 4px brush-textured black line heavier on the shadow side of the jaw. Vermilion-red jacket over an electric-cyan sky, cyan-magenta chromatic split at the silhouette edge, fine face-dots against coarse background-dots reading depth. Hero pose held at 12fps while the camera pushes at 24fps. Turkish onomatopoeia 'ŞIK' breaks into the upper-right frame as a drawn object, bold comic letters with drop shadow. Background: a layered Istanbul rooftop, a Turkish sign 'AÇIK' as a flat cyan plate. Motion seed: head turning mid-arc on a 2s hold, a speed-line streak already drawn behind the shoulder. AVOID: Miles Morales, spider emblem, web-suit pattern, clean vector line, English POW, motion blur, naturalistic shading. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Jujutsu Kaisen — MAPPA
worlds.one_liner: MAPPA's underexposed cel: key light often absent, subject carved by a cold rim against crushed blue-black, cursed energy an abstract fractal smoke tendril — and at the peak, one or two ink-smear frames where the drawing dissolves into brush motion.
worlds.render_law: Contemporary MAPPA-style television-animation frame in the modern dark-shonen production lineage — a deliberately UNDEREXPOSED 2D cel system, 1-1.5 stops below standard cel. (1) EXPOSURE: shadow zones dominate the frame; the subject is rim-lit rather than fill-lit, and the key light is frequently ABSENT — the form reads as a near-silhouette outlined by a cold edge. (2) CEL VALUES: 3 steps, but the shadow value is push-crushed toward blue-black; backgrounds desaturated hard. (3) LINE: confident 2-3px black at rest, HIGH interior line count (fabric folds, hair strand, muscle definition), but at the peak of an action it becomes an INK-SMEAR frame — one or two frames where the drawing dissolves into a brush-ink motion streak and then resolves back to clean line. This smear is the MAPPA signature, not decoration. (4) CURSED ENERGY: abstract fractal black-smoke tendrils with a faint teal-cyan core glow — NEVER a named franchise curse, technique icon, or domain. (5) BACKGROUNDS: photobash-heavy — real photo reference under a painted cool overlay, aggressive atmospheric perspective so the mid-ground fades hazy and grayscale. (6) EFFECTS: hand-drawn on 8-12 frame cycles, never CGI. Post: cold film curve, teal-blue shadow lift, saturation reserved only for a blood or cursed-energy accent against the desaturation. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL, authentic flat animation. Forbid any 3D, 2.5D, gradient-airbrush cel, or realistic light interpretation; forbid warm-palette dominance.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line at rest with high interior detail (folds, strands, muscle). At the action peak, 1-2 ink-smear brush-motion frames dissolve the line before it resolves. Shadow value crushes toward blue-black; the line survives into the dark where the fill does not.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat 2D. Simulated 24-35mm wide during action, 50mm portrait for the drama beat. 16:9. Compositional Dutch tilt permitted at an emotional or dread beat. No physical DOF — depth reads through atmospheric haze.
worlds.camera_grammar: Wide 24-35mm during the curse action, 50mm portrait for the drama beat — the two never blend inside one shot. Framing is dread-first: negative space above the subject, the dark pressing in; a compositional dutch tilt is permitted at an emotional or dread beat. The camera holds still and lets the rim-light and the smear do all the movement. Never a handheld shake, never a top-down vantage, never an interior vantage, never a human vantage, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage.
worlds.light_law: Rim-dominant. Key light is often absent, the rim outlining the form against a darker ground. Cold blue-black shadow, warm-amber OR cursed-teal rim. Bounce fill minimal or none. The cursed-energy tendril, when present, is a faint local teal glow source, not a bloom that floods the frame.

palette_lock.bias: cold blue-gray desaturation dominant — the frame lives below middle exposure; a single warm rim OR a cursed-teal accent is the only saturated event against the grey field. Blood, when present, is the one warm red permitted. NO earth-green, NO pastel, NO Ghibli-warm ambient, NO lifted flat midtone.

worlds.motion_cadence: Deliberate hold, then 1-2 ink-smear peak frames, then a hard hold on impact. 24fps camera, character 12fps, effects on 8fps loop. 2-3s hold after a climax action while atmosphere settles. Stillness carries dread; the smear carries violence.
negative_lock: NO Yuji Itadori, NO Megumi, NO Nobara, NO Gojo, NO Sukuna, NO Geto, NO Nanami, NO Toji, NO Mahito, NO any named Jujutsu Kaisen character
NO Shibuya, NO Tokyo Jujutsu High, NO Culling Game location, NO named JJK location
NO Sukuna finger, NO Ryomen mouth-mark, NO Gojo blindfold or six-eyes glow, NO domain-expansion visual signature
NO Jujutsu-Tech black-uniform school outfit
NO 3D render, NO 2.5D hybrid, NO gradient-airbrush cel, NO realistic shading
NO warm-palette dominance, NO pastel, NO lifted flat exposure
Turkish label only — brush kanji-inspired stroke weight allowed, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: MAPPA-style underexposed-cel frame in modern dark-shonen production grammar. Subject: Mamilas character mid-close-up in profile, rim-lit from camera-right with a cursed-teal edge, key light absent, the form reading as a near-silhouette against crushed blue-black. Confident 2-3px black line, high interior fold detail. Background: a photobash Istanbul night alley under a cool-blue painted overlay, mid-ground hazed to grayscale. Abstract cursed-energy fractal smoke tendrils with a faint teal core rise from the ground plane behind the figure. Turkish label 'GECE' brush-inked on a brick wall. Motion seed: the eye opening — the very next frame will smear into ink as the energy pulses. AVOID: Gojo, Sukuna finger, domain expansion, Jujutsu-Tech uniform, warm palette, 3D. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Demon Slayer — Ufotable
worlds.one_liner: Ufotable's 3-layer composite: strict 2D cel character over hand-painted-over 3D background, topped by fluid-sim + hand-keyed effects that dwarf the cel figure in luminous scale.
worlds.render_law: Ufotable studio production frame in the demon-blade / dark-fantasy action lineage. THREE DISTINCT RENDER LAYERS composited together — this is the Ufotable signature, not optional decoration. Layer 1 — Character Cel: strict 2D cel with crisp uniform 2px black line (zero taper, zero weight variation on body), 3-value flat fill (highlight/mid/shadow), shadow value is a warm-cool midtone, never achromatic grey or pure black fill. Cel skin has a single warm mid-value and one painted cool-rim accent — no subsurface scattering, no CG shading bleed onto the character layer. Layer 2 — Background Environment: full 3D-modeled geometry (architecture, foliage, rock, water surface) rendered and then hand-painted-over to produce a luminous, tactile look — painted wet highlights on stone, moss texture that reads brushed, volumetric god-ray shafts with visible particulate atmosphere. This layer has genuine depth, parallax on slow pan, and dew or moisture on surface materials. It must NOT look like raw octane/V-Ray output. Layer 3 — Effects: this is the Ufotable crown — digital fluid simulation (water ribbon, flame surge, energy slash) composited over and behind the character, drawn with hand-keyed anchor frames blended with the sim output. Effects generate their own light: fire rim-fills the character from below, water reflection throws cool caustics upward. Effect scale often EXCEEDS the character — the water form towers over the figure, the flame column rises past the frame top. Hanafuda-influenced particle clusters (concentric petals, spiral dot-burst) are a recognizable atmospheric texture. Post: filmic curve, warm highlight protection, cool shadow push, mild bloom on practical sources, 2.35:1 letterbox common. IMPERATIVE: THREE-LAYER COMPOSITE IS THE RULE. Character = strict 2D cel (no CG shading). Background = painted-over 3D (not flat 2D, not raw CG). Effects = fluid-sim + hand-key composite (not cartoon sparkle).
worlds.line_grammar: Character layer: crisp 2px uniform black line on body and face, zero taper. Interior lines minimal — only anatomy fold that affects silhouette. Hair lines tight and parallel within volume. Effects layer has its own brush-textured contour line: water ribbon shows wet-edge fringe, flame shows torn painterly edge — these lines are NOT the same as character cel lines.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated 40-85mm anamorphic feel, 2.35:1 letterbox option on action sequences. Character close-up simulates f/2.8 shallow with painted background softening. Wide environment simulates f/8 full-depth parallax pan. Bloom on high-energy practical sources (lantern, moon, effects). Mild chromatic aberration at effect layer edges only.
worlds.camera_grammar: Anamorphic 40-85mm staging at 2.35 for the action sequence, the character close-up carved shallow against a painted-soft background. The camera moves with the effect, not against it: a sweeping arc that follows the elemental ribbon, a rising vantage as the technique blooms, then a hold on the peak pose. Wide environment frames read at f/8 depth — the world is legible behind the character. Never a handheld shake, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Single motivated key with volumetric god-ray shafts and visible particulate atmosphere. Warm key rim on character from primary motivated source. Cool ambient fill on the shadow side. Effects carry their own light and project back onto the character: fire glow is a warm face-fill from below, water splash throws cool-blue caustic scatter upward onto chin and forearms. Dew and moisture on stone and leaf surfaces catches the god-ray as micro-specular. Particulates (dust, petal, ember) always present in the air column.

palette_lock.bias: cool blue-slate shadow (Layer 2 background depth), warm fire-amber OR teal-water accent (Layer 3 effects — pick one per scene, not both), cream-warm highlight. Character cel shadow is desaturated warm-cool midtone, NOT the deep background blue. Hanafuda-influenced particle accents: rose-pink petal clusters, deep indigo dot-burst. NO neon, NO desaturated flat wash, NO raw-CG plastic grey.

worlds.motion_cadence: 24fps camera. Character cel on 12fps limited animation (2s). Effects layer at 24fps full simulation — the contrast between limited cel and full-rate effects is deliberate and signature. 1-frame painted smear at peak impact within the effects layer. 2-3 second hold after a signature technique completes — character stands still while particles settle. God-ray shafts breathe (slow pulse, 48-60 frame cycle).
negative_lock: NO Tanjiro, NO Nezuko, NO Zenitsu, NO Inosuke, NO Giyu, NO Rengoku, NO Muzan, NO any named Demon Slayer character
NO Taisho-era Japan, NO cedar forest, NO Mount Natagumo, NO Infinity Castle, NO any named Demon Slayer location
NO checkered green-black haori pattern, NO Nichirin sword, NO hanafuda earrings
NO named breathing style visual signature (Water Breathing dragon form, Flame Breathing, etc.) — effects must be abstract fluid or user-directed
NO fully 3D CGI character — character MUST be strict 2D cel on Layer 1
NO CG shading bleed onto character cel (no subsurface, no normal-map shading on skin or hair)
NO raw octane/V-Ray CG background — background MUST read hand-painted-over
NO cartoon sparkle effects — effects must read as fluid-sim or hand-keyed fluid motion
Turkish label only — brush-kanji-inspired stroke geometry allowed, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Ufotable 3-layer composite frame in demon-blade action production grammar. LAYER 1 — Mamilas character mid-shot at 2.35:1 letterbox: 2px crisp uniform black line, 3-value warm-cool cel skin, cool-slate shadow side. LAYER 2 — painted-over 3D Istanbul stone bridge at night: hand-brushed wet highlights on mossy granite, volumetric god-ray shaft from a lantern to camera-right cutting through particulate mist, dew micro-specular on every surface edge. LAYER 3 — water ribbons rising off the rain-slicked bridge surface, fluid-sim contour with wet-edge brush fringe, reflecting the lantern warm-amber onto character forearms from below as cool-caustic scatter; hanafuda-petal particle clusters orbiting the effect periphery. Bloom on lantern source. Turkish label 'KÖPRÜ' brush-inked on a wooden post, kanji-inspired stroke weight. Motion seed: character mid-exhale, warm breath mist mid-cycle, water ribbons in expansion phase. AVOID: Tanjiro, checkered haori, Nichirin sword, named breathing styles, raw CG background, CG shading on character skin, cartoon sparkle. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: One Piece — Toei Bold-Cel
worlds.one_liner: Toei's frog-eye low angle + hand-brush cumulus sky drama + rubber-elastic anatomy with DIRECTIONAL distortion — face widens HORIZONTALLY, jaw drops below collar, mouth stretches toward ear line.
worlds.render_law: Toei-style bold-cel production frame in the grand-voyage shonen-adventure lineage. Character silhouette is built with 3-5px uniform pure-black outline, no taper, no variation — the line is a declaration, not a description. Fill is 2-value flat cel: saturated mid and deep-saturated marine shadow (never grey, never black fill). Sky is the emotional engine: hand-brush-painted cumulus masses in cream-gold over cobalt-marine, flaring amber-orange at climactic beats; the sky occupies the top two-thirds of the frame while figures tower up from the bottom third against it. Horizon line sits 20-30% from frame bottom — frog-eye camera, steep receding perspective, subjects visually enormous against the world. Anatomical grammar: broad shoulder-to-hip ratio, oversized hands at emotional peak, limbs that rubber-stretch with DIRECTION — horizontal face-widen on reaction (mouth toward ear line, jaw sub-collar), vertical neck-stretch on shock gags, limbs that smear directionally and recoil. The open sea reads deep teal-navy, never resort turquoise. Invented fictional signage — wanted-poster paper, pennants, caravel-hybrid timber hull with carved figurehead — lives inside the frame as dressing, always plausible adventure-world, never a canonical franchise property. Speed lines are dry-brush scratches; dust and smoke are rough dry-brush shapes; sweat-drops and blush-blocks are flat graphic symbols on the face, not painterly. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL SHADING. No 3D, no 2.5D, no subsurface gradient, no realistic anatomy proportion, no pastel or muted tone.
worlds.line_grammar: Uniform 3-5px pure-black outline, zero taper, zero weight variation. Silhouette-first — interior line appears only for major muscle definition or a fabric fold under emotional emphasis. Shadow step is flat color, never a line. Face symbols (sweat-drop, blush-block, speed-line burst) are graphic shapes, not drawn detail.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated 25-35mm from below chest height: steep receding perspective, horizon low in frame (20-30% from bottom). Frog-eye default, comic fish-eye distortion pushed during wide comedy reaction shots. 50mm portrait only for quiet emotional beats. No lens flare, no DOF — full flat 2D depth.
worlds.camera_grammar: Frog-eye is the default: plant the lens BELOW chest height and tilt up, so the horizon sits low (20-30% from the bottom) and everything recedes steeply above it. Adventure breadth over intimacy — favour a wide 25-35mm read that keeps sky and silhouette in the same frame; a 50mm portrait only for a quiet emotional beat, never for action. Move once and commit: a low lateral track along the action line, or a rising vantage that lets the silhouette gain scale against the bright sky plane. Never a telephoto macro, never a top-down vantage, never a human vantage, never an eye-level neutral vantage — the low angle IS the world.
worlds.light_law: Hard 2-value cel lighting: mid and shadow step, crisp boundary between them. Shadow tone is deep-saturated marine, never achromatic. Sky is the primary light source and palette engine — gold-cream overhead on adventure beats, amber-orange raking at climactic ones. Hair spec and metal highlights get a single extra light value step. No gradient, no atmospheric fall-off.

palette_lock.bias: poster-primary saturation: marine-blue shadow, primary yellow mid, primary red accent, cream highlight. Open sea = deep teal-navy, never resort turquoise. Sky cumulus = cream-gold to amber-orange at story peaks. NO pastel, NO desaturated wash, NO neon, NO earth-tone muted palette.

worlds.motion_cadence: 12fps character animation on 2s. Smear frame at peak action: single frame, multi-ghost limb painted laterally in motion direction. Speed lines during burst. Hard freeze on reaction shot 24-36 frames — hold for beat, then instant cut. Exaggeration reads direction before it reads speed.
negative_lock: NO Luffy, NO Zoro, NO Nami, NO Sanji, NO Chopper, NO Robin, NO Franky, NO Brook, NO Jinbe, NO Ace, NO Shanks, NO Blackbeard, NO any named One Piece character
NO Straw Hat emblem, NO Jolly Roger, NO named pirate crew insignia
NO Grand Line, NO Alabasta, NO Water 7, NO Wano, NO Dressrosa, NO any named One Piece location
NO Devil Fruit visual signature — NO Gomu Gomu rubber-stretch specifically
NO desaturated, muted, or pastel palette
NO slim generic-anime proportions (must have Toei adventure breadth)
NO gradient or airbrush fill — flat 2-value only
NO 3D render, NO cel-shaded 3D, NO 2.5D hybrid
NO realistic anatomy or realistic shading
Turkish label only — bold display letterform with drop shadow, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Toei-style bold-cel frame in grand-voyage shonen production grammar. Frog-eye from knee height: Mamilas character towers at mid-shot, bold 4px pure-black uniform outline, 2-value flat cel — primary-yellow shirt, primary-red sash, deep marine shadow step. Behind: hand-brush-painted cumulus masses in cream-gold over cobalt-marine, horizon at 25% from bottom, open deep-teal-navy sea beneath a wooden dock. Reaction mid-forming: face widening HORIZONTALLY, mouth corner stretching toward right ear line, jaw dropped below collar, eyes ballooned with single huge white spec. An invented wanted-poster (fictional face, ink-stained paper, Turkish text 'ARANIYOR') nailed to a timber mast. Turkish label 'MACERA' as bold-display dry-brush onomatopoeia, upper right, drop shadow. Motion seed: mouth opening into a shout, single-frame dry-brush dust puff kicking at heels. AVOID: Luffy, Straw Hat, Jolly Roger, gradient fill, realistic anatomy, pastel tone, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Roger Deakins — Naturalist Real
worlds.one_liner: Deakins' motivated-single-source discipline: one practical or natural key, genuine negative fill into true black point, shadow side of subject is dark and stays dark — 2.39:1 anamorphic, ARRI Alexa 65 grain floor, zero Hollywood teal-orange excess.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal cinematography in the Roger Deakins ASC BSC naturalist production lineage. The Deakins signature is a DISCIPLINE OF RESTRAINT, not a look — it is what he refuses that defines the image: (1) SINGLE MOTIVATED SOURCE — every photon in the frame is traceable to a practical or natural light source that is visible or strongly implied in-frame: window sun, tungsten desk lamp, sodium street lamp, fire, moon. If a source is not visible, its fixture is present somewhere in the scene (the lamp is just off-frame but its spill is clean and directional). Fill light is ONLY what bounces off a real visible surface — a white wall at 30° from key, the ground, the underside of a table. (2) NEGATIVE FILL — the shadow side of the subject is NOT lifted. Contrast ratio 4:1 to 6:1 is typical; the shadow side of a face often goes to below-18-grey and sometimes to near-black. This is intentional and primary — the darkness IS the image. (3) CAMERA DISCIPLINE — locked-off or slow deliberate dolly at 2-5mph, never exceeding what a skilled grip could push on a Mitchell dolly. No handheld organic-vérité movement. The camera is pre-determined — Deakins knows every position before the shot, and the framing is final at the start of the take. (4) COMPOSITION — a small figure in a large environment. Deakins frequently composes a solitary subject occupying 10-20% of the frame against a vast sky, a long corridor, a horizon plain. Negative space is structural, not empty. (5) ASPECT AND OPTICS — 2.39:1 anamorphic feel using Master Anamorphic or Hawk V-lite primes: horizontal lens streak flare from bright practicals is present but refined (not an Abrams-style flare, but a subtle organic streak that registers as a real optical artifact). ARRI Alexa 65 sensor: fine organic grain, wide tonal latitude from deep shadow to protected highlight, no digital clipping hardness. (6) GRADE — naturalistic, not stylized: warm highlights, cool shadows, skin tone accurate to source light temperature (sodium = amber skin, daylight = neutral skin, tungsten = warm skin), but midtones NEVER pushed into teal. No Hollywood teal-orange excess. IMPERATIVE: Absolute realism with motivated-single-source discipline. Forbid fill-flash flat lighting, handheld shake, Hollywood teal-orange grade, plastic AI glow skin, neon, fluorescent green.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — photoreal. No drawn lines. Silhouette reads entirely via light: the bright key side defines the form edge against background, the shadow side dissolves into the background darkness. Deep focus edges are natural optical transitions, not drawn. Skin micro-texture (pore, beard shadow, fine line) is present at close-up from the ARRI sensor's fine grain resolve.
worlds.lens_grammar: Master Anamorphic primes: 40mm, 50mm, 65mm most common. f/2.8 for character isolation (rare — Deakins prefers contextual depth), f/4-f/5.6 standard, f/8-f/11 for vast environment frames. 2.39:1 aspect. Horizontal streak flare from practicals: present, 1-2 stops above exposure on the source, refined organic streak NOT a cartoon ray. ARRI Alexa 65 sensor: organic fine grain (most visible in shadows and skin shadow-side), deep DR, no clipping harshness in highlight rolloff. Mild chromatic aberration at extreme field edges only.
worlds.camera_grammar: Let the frame breathe: 40-65mm anamorphic at 2.39, staged so the subject sits INSIDE its environment rather than isolated from it — contextual depth over shallow separation, and a rack to a face only when the story earns it. The camera is locked off or moves once, slowly and with reason: a deliberate dolly, a patient reframe. Composition is architectural — a doorway, a horizon, a corridor of light doing the work. Hold long enough for the light to be read. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Single motivated key source (practical or natural, visible or implied). Bounce fill only: off a real surface at a real angle — white wall, ground, underside of architectural overhang. Shadow side into deep territory: 4:1 contrast standard, 6:1 at dramatic peaks. Practicals in-frame composed and exposed at 1 stop above key — the lamp is a visual element, not a light meter target. Highlights protected — Deakins rates the Alexa at 800 ISO and reserves headroom: highlights roll off organically, never clip. All skin tone accurate to the source's color temperature, never color-corrected to a standard beauty look.

palette_lock.bias: earth-natural: umber, ochre, olive-neutral, sky-grey. Accent = single warm practical (tungsten amber, fire orange, sodium yellow — pick one per scene). Skin follows source temperature: sodium yields amber-cast, tungsten yields warm-honey, daylight yields neutral-beige. NO teal-orange Hollywood grade (shadow never pushed to cyan), NO neon, NO fluorescent, NO saturated primary, NO clean-white fill.

worlds.motion_cadence: Locked-off preferred. Slow deliberate dolly at 2-4 seconds to traverse the frame width — no acceleration, constant speed as if on a motorized head. Long take: cuts are rare, the camera watches the scene unfold rather than editing rhythm imposing itself. When the camera does move, the movement is pre-determined and final — no reframing in post. Breathing room: at least 2-3 seconds of held frame before and after any significant action.
negative_lock: NO Ryan Gosling K, NO Rick Deckard, NO James Bond, NO Anton Chigurh, NO any named Deakins-shot character
NO Blade Runner Los Angeles, NO 1917 trench system, NO Skyfall Glencoe, NO No Country for Old Men Texas highway, NO any named Deakins-shot location
NO handheld shake, NO Steadicam drift, NO vérité camera movement of any kind
NO Hollywood teal-orange grade — shadow NEVER pushed to cyan, midtones NEVER split-toned
NO fill-flash, NO flat even lighting, NO lifted shadow fill that opens up the dark side
NO neon, NO fluorescent green, NO oversaturated primary color
NO rim-light as decoration (rim only when motivated by a real source behind the subject)
NO AI plastic-smooth skin — skin must show micro-texture, pore, and light fall-off
Turkish label only — naturalistic signage weathered and integrated into real environment, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal cinematography in the Roger Deakins ASC/BSC production discipline. Locked-off frame. 2.39:1 anamorphic aspect. 50mm Master Anamorphic at f/4. Single motivated key: sodium street lamp below and to camera-left, casting amber light upward at 30° — source implied by its spill angle, no fill added. Subject: Mamilas character at medium distance (occupying 20% of frame height), standing at the edge of a wide Istanbul rooftop at dusk, shadow side of face and body going to near-black (5:1 contrast ratio), amber sodium key on key-side cheekbone and shoulder. Background: vast sky at civil twilight — deep grey-blue, no orange gradient (source is below, not behind). Foreground: rust-textured metal railing catching a 1-stop horizontal streak flare from the sodium source below, refined and organic. ARRI Alexa 65 fine grain visible in the deep shadow areas and railing shadow. Turkish label 'İSTANBUL' as weathered painted letters on a distant rooftop structure, faded and barely legible at this scale. Motion seed: character mid-exhale, cigarette smoke drifting upward and catching the sodium amber on its first foot of rise. AVOID: Ryan Gosling, Blade Runner LA, teal-orange grade, any fill light on shadow side, handheld shake, neon, AI plastic skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: David Fincher — Precision Real
worlds.one_liner: Fincher's controlled precision: motorized-dolly-perfect or locked-off, geometry placed to the pixel, deep focus at f/5.6-f/8, restrained teal-shadow / warm-practical grade, and a fine 35mm-emulsion grain laid over digital sharpness to kill the plastic edge.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal cinematography in the David Fincher / Jeff Cronenweth / Erik Messerschmidt lineage. The Fincher signature is CONTROL — nothing in frame is accidental. (1) CAMERA: locked-off or motorized-dolly-perfect, NEVER handheld; when it moves it is a slow programmed push over 4-6 seconds. (2) COMPOSITION: geometric — exact symmetry, one-point perspective, or a rule-of-thirds intersection hit precisely; walls squared, props positioned, the subject centered or on a mathematical third. (3) FOCUS: deep — f/5.6-f/8 typical, Fincher prefers everything sharp over shallow bokeh. (4) SENSOR + GRAIN: RED or Alexa Mini digital sharpness softened by a fine 35mm-emulsion film grain to kill the digital edge; slight lateral chromatic aberration at the frame edge. (5) GRADE: restrained teal-and-orange — shadows push toward steel-teal, highlights toward warm candle-amber, but midtones and skin stay accurate, never split-toned into excess. (6) LIGHT: motivated practicals composed AS part of the frame (a desk lamp at an exact angle, monitor glow raking the face from below); shadow falls into teal territory but not pure black; skin protected accurate. IMPERATIVE: absolute realism with obsessive geometric control — use negative fill, motivated practicals, 35mm grain, subtle chromatic aberration, and raw skin micro-texture. Forbid handheld shake, shallow-bokeh dominance, warm-cozy grade, AI plastic-smooth skin, teal-orange excess.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — photoreal. Sharp digital detail resolved by a clean sensor, edges softened only by the grain overlay. Silhouette reads via precise value separation and deep-focus edge, never a drawn line. Skin holds pore and micro-texture at close-up.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35mm, 40mm, 50mm primes on RED or Alexa Mini. f/5.6-f/8 deep focus. 1.85:1 or 2.00:1. Digital sharpness present, softened by fine 35mm-emulsion grain. No lens flare unless a single motivated practical. Slight lateral chromatic aberration at the frame edge only.
worlds.camera_grammar: The frame is engineered: 35-50mm at deep focus, geometry locked, the subject placed on an exact axis and held there. The camera is locked off or executes one perfectly motivated move — a precise dolly, a slow push along the axis; nothing organic, nothing casual. Symmetry and negative space are deliberate, and the frame edge is as composed as its centre. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage.
worlds.light_law: One motivated practical plus one soft key plus minimal fill. Practicals — desk lamp, monitor, phone screen — are composed as visual elements at exact angles, not light-meter targets. Shadow falls into steel-teal but holds detail, never pure black. Skin protected accurate to the practical's temperature.

palette_lock.bias: restrained steel-teal shadow against a warm candle-amber highlight, with earth-neutral midtones and accurate protected skin. The teal-and-orange separation is disciplined, present only in the extremes of the curve — never a saturated split-tone. NO neon, NO saturated primary, NO Hollywood teal-orange excess, NO warm-cozy lift.

worlds.motion_cadence: Locked-off or precision motorized dolly — no handheld ever. Slow reveals over 4-6 seconds at constant velocity. Focus pulls land exactly on the beat. Cuts are precise and on the beat, never a reframe in post.
negative_lock: NO Mark Zuckerberg, NO Tyler Durden, NO Amazing Amy, NO Holden Ford, NO any named Fincher-directed character
NO Facebook office, NO Fight Club basement, NO Zodiac newsroom, NO Mindhunter FBI office, NO named Fincher location
NO handheld shake, NO shallow-focus bokeh dominance, NO warm-cozy grade
NO neon unless a single composed practical
NO rim-light as decoration, NO porcelain or AI plastic-smooth skin, NO excessive smoothing
NO teal-orange split-tone excess — the grade stays restrained
Turkish label only — precision sans-serif signage, sharp and legible, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal cinematography in the David Fincher / Erik Messerschmidt lineage. Locked-off symmetrical composition, 40mm on Alexa Mini at f/5.6 deep focus, 2.00:1. Subject: Mamilas character seated at a dark-wood desk in a Beyoğlu apartment, centered exactly on the frame axis. A warm-tungsten desk lamp rakes the desk surface at a precise 30-degree angle from the left; cool-teal monitor glow lifts the face from below. Ceiling and walls fall into steel-teal shadow, geometric edges emphasized, fine 35mm-emulsion grain over the sharpness. Turkish label 'DOSYA 47' printed in precision sans-serif on a document at the desk edge, sharp and legible. Motion seed: the hand reaching for the document mid-arc, the motorized dolly beginning a slow push-in. AVOID: Mark Zuckerberg, Fight Club, handheld, shallow bokeh, neon, warm-cozy grade, plastic skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Wes Anderson — Symmetric Real
worlds.one_liner: Anderson's rigid symmetry: dead-center one-point perspective, everything mirrored on the vertical axis, coordinated pastel palette of 2-3 muted colors per character, flat even motivated light, and snap-whip pans between locked positions.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal cinematography in the Wes Anderson / Robert Yeoman lineage (symmetric pastel live-action feature comedies). The signature is obsessive SYMMETRY and coordinated design. (1) COMPOSITION: rigid one-point perspective, dead-center, everything mirrored along the vertical axis; every prop period-styled and precisely placed. (2) CAMERA: locked-off, a perpendicular tracking dolly, or a snap-whip pan between locked positions — never organic movement. (3) PALETTE: pastel-vintage and coordinated — mint green, salmon pink, mustard yellow, powder blue, cream white — all muted; each character's costume limited to 2-3 coordinated colors. (4) TYPOGRAPHY: hand-drawn Futura or Archer-style sans-serif, always legible, always composed as part of the frame. (5) LIGHT: motivated but even and flat — Anderson avoids dramatic shadow; fill matches key temperature (no complementary bounce); 2:1 contrast, everything readable; skin slightly desaturated to sit inside the pastel environment. (6) DEPTH: compressed — 35-40mm neutral, subjects arranged in flat perpendicular layers, deep focus, no shallow bokeh. (7) ASPECT: 1.37:1 Academy or 2.00:1 flat. IMPERATIVE: absolute realism inside rigid symmetry — negative fill only where the design allows, motivated even light, 35mm grain, subtle chromatic aberration, raw skin micro-texture. Forbid handheld shake, shallow bokeh, high contrast, saturated primary, dramatic chiaroscuro.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — photoreal, but the frame reads graphic because of the symmetry and pastel flatness. Silhouette separation comes from coordinated color blocks against a coordinated ground, not from contrast.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35-40mm primes. f/5.6-f/8 deep focus. 1.37:1 Academy or 2.00:1 flat. No lens flare. Kodak Vision3 250D grade pushed toward pastel. Perpendicular tracking or snap-whip pans only.
worlds.camera_grammar: Dead-centre symmetry, planimetric and perpendicular: the camera faces its subject square-on, the frame divided as if by a ruler. 35-40mm at deep focus so every plane is legible at once. Movement is only ever perpendicular — a lateral track along the wall, a dolly straight in, or a snap-whip pan to the next tableau. Never a handheld shake, never an oblique or three-quarter vantage, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage.
worlds.light_law: Motivated but even and flat. Fill light matches the key temperature — no complementary bounce. Shadow soft and low-contrast, 2:1 typical, everything readable. Dramatic shadow is forbidden; the light serves the symmetry, not the drama.

palette_lock.bias: coordinated muted-pastel — sage-mint shadow, warm peach-cream mid, salmon-rose accent, cream highlight — all low-saturation and harmonized as a single designed palette. Skin desaturated slightly to sit inside it. NO neon, NO deep black, NO saturated primary, NO teal-orange grade, NO high-contrast shadow.

worlds.motion_cadence: Locked-off or perpendicular dolly; snap-whip pans between locked positions. Cuts precise on the beat. Long stillness allowed 3-5s. Any character motion is staged perpendicular or parallel to the frame plane, never diagonal-organic.
negative_lock: NO M. Gustave, NO Suzy Bishop, NO Sam Shakusky, NO Steve Zissou, NO Max Fischer, NO Royal Tenenbaum, NO any named Anderson character
NO Grand Budapest Hotel, NO Isle of Dogs, NO New Penzance, NO Asteroid City, NO named Anderson location
NO handheld shake, NO shallow bokeh, NO high contrast, NO saturated primary, NO dramatic chiaroscuro
NO rim-light as decoration, NO porcelain or AI plastic-smooth skin, NO excessive smoothing
Turkish label only — hand-drawn Futura or Archer-style sans-serif, precisely composed and centered, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal cinematography in the Wes Anderson / Robert Yeoman lineage. Dead-center one-point perspective, 40mm at f/5.6 deep focus, 2.00:1. Subject: Mamilas character standing centered in the doorway of a pastel sage-mint hotel lobby, symmetric along the vertical axis. Costume: mustard-yellow jacket, salmon-pink shirt, cream trousers — three coordinated colors. Background: two identical brass wall-lamps flanking the doorway, a cream ceiling with parallel ornamental molding mirrored left and right. Even flat motivated light, low contrast, everything readable. Turkish label 'RESEPSİYON' hand-drawn in Futura-style sans-serif on a brass plaque, dead-centered above the doorway. Motion seed: the character mid-turn, preparing to walk perpendicular to camera. AVOID: M. Gustave, Grand Budapest signage, handheld, shallow bokeh, high contrast, saturated primary, dramatic shadow. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Emmanuel Lubezki — Documentary Naturalist
worlds.one_liner: Lubezki's natural-light-only doctrine: sun/moon/fire/window the only sources, magic-hour and blue-hour the default register, wide primes at 14-21mm in deep focus, handheld micro-drift alive with breath — no artificial fixture ever enters the frame.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal cinematography in the Emmanuel 'Chivo' Lubezki AMC lineage. The signature is a REFUSAL of artificial light. (1) SOURCE: natural ONLY — sun, moon, fire, candle, window skylight; no artificial fixture visible or used; fill comes from sky bounce (cool blue), never a rig. (2) REGISTER: magic hour and blue hour are the default — low warm sun with long raking golden shadows, or cool cerulean-shadow blue hour with protected warm highlights. (3) CAMERA: handheld with intentional micro-drift and organic breath — not shaky war-doc, not dead-stabilized, but human-alive; the camera weaves through space following action in long uninterrupted arcs; reframes are natural, discovered, not choreographed. (4) LENS: wide primes — 14mm, 16mm, 21mm, sometimes 35mm — wide enough to hold environment context around the subject, with slight uncorrected barrel distortion at the frame edge. (5) DEPTH: deep, f/5.6-f/8, environment sharp. (6) TEXTURE: organic silver-halide 35mm grain in all values, natural highlight bloom (the atmosphere diffuses, no added filter), skin and foliage holding sub-pixel texture. (7) GRADE: golden-earth dominant — umber skin in magic hour, natural in daylight, cool-blue in blue hour; no teal-orange. IMPERATIVE: absolute realism from natural light only — negative fill, motivated natural source, 35mm grain, slight chromatic aberration, raw skin micro-texture. Forbid artificial fixtures, handheld SHAKE (micro-drift is alive, not chaotic), teal-orange grade, fill flash, shallow-bokeh dominance, AI plastic skin.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — photoreal. Wide-angle organic barrel distortion at the frame edges. Silhouette reads via natural light separation; skin and foliage hold sub-pixel texture under the grain.
worlds.lens_grammar: Wide primes: 14mm, 16mm, 21mm, 35mm. f/5.6-f/8 deep focus. 1.85:1 or 2.39:1. Natural highlight bloom from atmosphere, no added diffusion. 35mm silver-halide grain. Slight uncorrected barrel distortion at the frame edge.
worlds.camera_grammar: The camera is a body in the room: wide 14-35mm, deep focus, close to the subject and always breathing. It walks with the action in long continuous takes, reframing as a witness would, never cutting away from what it must see. Available light and real geometry do everything; the vantage is human, at head height, inside the event rather than observing it. Never a locked tripod hold, never a telephoto macro, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Natural sources only — sun key, cool sky-bounce fill, fire or candle as practical secondary. Magic-hour bias: warm low sun, long shadows. No artificial fixture, no fill flash. Shadow falls into natural darkness, never lifted.

palette_lock.bias: golden-earth warmth dominant in magic hour — umber shadow, warm-tan mid, low-sun amber accent, warm-cream highlight — shifting to cool cerulean shadow with protected warm highlights in blue hour. Skin follows the natural source temperature. NO teal-orange grade, NO neon, NO artificial saturation, NO cool fill flash.

worlds.motion_cadence: Handheld micro-drift with organic breath. Long-take aspiration — 30s to 2min continuous, the camera weaving through space following action. Reframes are natural and discovered, not choreographed. No cut where a move can carry the beat.
negative_lock: NO Hugh Glass, NO Riggan Thomson, NO Theo Faron, NO any named Lubezki-shot character
NO Revenant frontier wilderness (unless the brief asks Turkey wilderness), NO Birdman theater, NO Children of Men London bus
NO artificial light source, NO fill flash, NO handheld SHAKE (micro-drift only)
NO neon, NO teal-orange grade, NO shallow-bokeh dominance
NO rim-light as decoration, NO porcelain or AI plastic-smooth skin, NO excessive smoothing
Turkish label only — naturalistic, weathered, integrated into the real environment, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal cinematography in the Emmanuel Lubezki AMC lineage. Handheld micro-drift, 21mm wide prime at f/5.6 deep focus, 2.39:1. Subject: Mamilas character crossing a golden-lit Cappadocia hillside during magic hour, the sun low behind camera-right casting a long warm umber-shadow rake across the tuff-stone terrain, a warm golden rim on hair and jacket edge, cool sky-bounce filling the shadow side. Wide-angle slight barrel distortion at the frame edge. Environment context in deep focus: distant fairy chimneys sharp, faint hot-air balloons on the horizon. Turkish label 'GÖREME' integrated as a weathered wooden trail-marker at frame right. Motion seed: the subject mid-step, arms lowering, the camera micro-drift settling on a breath. AVOID: Hugh Glass, Revenant frontier, artificial light, teal-orange grade, shake, neon, plastic skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Kurzgesagt — Flat Isometric Explainer
worlds.one_liner: Flat-vector science explainer: every shape a solid fill with a 1-2px darker outline (never black), a locked isometric diagram camera on a near-black navy field, and a single warm amber 'insight' glow blooming only at the moment of understanding.
worlds.render_law: Flat vector 2D explainer animation in the modern flat-isometric science-communication lineage (grammar only, not any named channel). (1) SHAPES: every shape is a flat solid-color fill with a subtle 1-2px darker-tone outline (never pure black), zero gradient except the deliberate soft glow halo around the single 'insight' light source. (2) FORMS: characters and props are geometric-simplified — rounded blob and capsule forms, no detailed anatomy. (3) CAMERA: a locked orthographic-feeling overhead or three-quarter isometric view of a diagram or system, never a dramatic Dutch angle. (4) BACKGROUND: near-black navy-charcoal, uncluttered, so the diagram reads instantly. (5) COLOR-CODING is systemic — each conceptual element keeps one consistent flat color across the whole sequence so the audience tracks it without labels. (6) DEPTH: faked with layering and a soft drop-shadow, never true perspective or camera parallax. IMPERATIVE: FLAT 2D VECTOR ONLY — forbid painterly texture, 3D render, photoreal lighting, gradient shading beyond the single insight-glow bloom, and camera Dutch-tilt or handheld drift.
worlds.line_grammar: Thin 1-2px darker-tone outline (never pure black), uniform weight, no taper. Shapes read as flat geometric silhouettes first; there is no interior rendering, only flat color separation.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated locked overhead or 3/4 isometric orthographic view. No lens distortion, no depth of field, no camera move beyond the diagram's own reveal.
worlds.camera_grammar: The camera is a locked diagram plate: overhead or a 3/4 isometric orthographic view, dead-on and unmoving. It never dollies, cranes, arcs or pushes — the diagram reveals itself, the camera does not travel to it. Frame the whole system at once so the relationships read; no close-up that hides a connector, no perspective that makes one node larger than its meaning. Never a lens distortion, never depth of field, never a human vantage.
worlds.light_law: One soft amber 'insight' glow source per beat — everything else flat-lit with no directional shadow. The glow blooms softly at the moment of understanding and never elsewhere; it is a narrative event, not ambient light.

palette_lock.bias: a flat near-black navy-charcoal field holding the diagram, a single deep teal-cyan secondary for systemic color-coding, and one warm amber insight-accent that blooms only at the understanding beat. Color is flat information, not light — the only glow is the insight halo. NO gradient shading, NO painterly texture, NO photoreal falloff.

worlds.motion_cadence: The isometric diagram expands from center; one connector line draws once to the insight node; the amber glow lands and holds. The camera is locked wide overhead — the diagram's own reveal IS the motion event, not the camera.
negative_lock: NO Kurzgesagt bird mascot or any named explainer-channel character
NO photoreal texture, NO 3D render, NO painterly brushwork
NO gradient shading beyond the single insight-glow bloom
NO camera Dutch-tilt or handheld drift
NO octane, NO ray tracing, NO realistic lighting
Turkish label only — flat sans-serif diagram lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Flat-vector science-explainer frame, locked 3/4 isometric diagram plate. Subject: the water cycle as one closed system on a near-black navy field — a flat cobalt-blue sea slab at lower left, a flat slate-grey mountain wedge at right, three capsule-rounded cloud forms in flat pale-cyan across the top, each shape a solid fill with a 1-2px darker-tone outline, never pure black. Systemic colour-coding does the teaching: every water element carries the same cobalt-blue — the rising vapour arrow, the cloud underbellies, the falling rain ticks — so the eye tracks water through the whole cycle without a single label; the mountain and ground stay slate-grey because they are not water. Depth is faked by layering and a soft drop-shadow under each cloud, never by perspective. One cobalt vapour arrow curves from sea to cloud; a soft amber insight-glow blooms at the cloud where condensation happens, and nowhere else in frame. Turkish label 'BUHARLAŞMA' in flat geometric sans beside the vapour arrow, printed flat onto the navy field. Motion seed: the vapour arrow one-third drawn, the amber glow one frame before it blooms. AVOID: any named explainer-channel mascot or bird, photoreal texture, 3D render, gradient shading beyond the single insight bloom, camera drift or Dutch tilt, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Whiteboard — RSA-Animate Sketch
worlds.one_liner: Hand-drawn lecture whiteboard: a pure cream board filling frame, confident pressure-variable graphite ink drawing itself in real time, one deliberate marker-wash color on the key node, and a real hand-and-marker visible at the active stroke edge.
worlds.render_law: Whiteboard/paper explainer animation in the hand-drawn real-time lecture-illustration lineage (grammar only, not any named series). (1) SURFACE: a pure cream-white board fills the frame; drawings appear as if hand-inked in real time. (2) LINE: confident graphite-black ink of varying pressure — thin start, thicker press, thin lift — zero color except one deliberate marker-wash color used to highlight the key concept node. (3) NO SCENERY beyond the board itself. (4) THE HAND: a human hand and forearm holding a marker is visible at the active drawing edge, entering and leaving frame naturally — never a disembodied line. (5) BUILD: composition builds left-to-right or center-out as concepts accumulate, never erased mid-sequence unless the beat explicitly calls for a wipe. IMPERATIVE: FLAT 2D HAND-DRAWN INK ONLY — forbid 3D, painterly rendering, photoreal hand skin, gradient, and any color beyond the graphite ink and the single marker-wash accent.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident graphite-black ink, pressure-variable weight (thin-thick-thin per stroke), visible start and end taper, occasional natural wobble — never a perfect vector curve. All lettering matches the same hand-inked stroke grammar.
worlds.lens_grammar: Locked flat-on camera facing the board, no perspective distortion, no camera move beyond a slow reveal pull-back at completion.
worlds.camera_grammar: The camera is locked flat-on to the board, dead square, no perspective. It does not dolly, crane, arc or push; the only permitted move is a slow reveal pull-back once the drawing completes. Frame so the whole diagram has room to grow — the ink fills the empty board, the composition is decided before the first stroke. The drawing hand and forearm enter and leave frame naturally at the active edge; they are never a subject, only the instrument. Never a perspective vantage, never a close-up that hides the diagram, never a camera move during the draw.
worlds.light_law: Flat even board illumination, no directional shadow beyond the small contact shadow the hand and marker cast on the board surface.

palette_lock.bias: a paper-white board base carrying the whole frame, graphite-grey ink as the only line value, and a single brick-red marker-wash accent flooding the key node.
