Everything else is unlit flat board-white — the wash is the only saturation. NO gradient, NO 3D shading, NO photographic texture, NO second accent color.

worlds.motion_cadence: One ink stroke draws forward continuously; the marker-wash floods once behind the key node; the camera pulls back slowly as the diagram completes; the hand exits frame; hold on the completed board.
negative_lock: NO RSA Animate logo or branding
NO named real-world lecturer or speaker likeness
NO color beyond the graphite-black ink and the single marker-wash accent
NO 3D render, NO painterly shading, NO photoreal hand skin
NO gradient, NO octane, NO ray tracing
Turkish label only — hand-inked lettering matching the stroke grammar, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Hand-drawn lecture-whiteboard frame. Subject: the water cycle inked in real time across a cream-white board — at lower left a wave-lined sea drawn in confident graphite-black, the line thin on the start, thicker through the pressed crest, thin on the lift; a mountain wedge at right in the same pressure-variable stroke; three cloud outlines already inked across the top. Between sea and cloud, a curved arrow is being drawn right now: the human hand and forearm hold the marker at the active stroke edge, entering from frame-right, the marker tip biting the board mid-curve, the forearm casting one small contact shadow on the board. The build is center-out and nothing has been erased. One brick-red marker-wash — the only colour on the board — floods the cloud where condensation happens; the sea, the mountain and the rain ticks stay pure graphite on flat board-white. Turkish label 'BUHARLAŞMA' hand-lettered beside the arrow in the same pressure-variable stroke grammar. Motion seed: the arrow two-thirds drawn, the marker mid-stroke, the red wash one frame before it blooms. AVOID: any named lecture-series branding or logo, named speaker likeness, any colour beyond the graphite ink and the single marker-wash, 3D render, photoreal hand skin, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Retro OVA — 90s Film-Cel Pastiche
worlds.one_liner: The 1987-94 OVA paradox: every held frame painted to theatrical finish while the motion stays limited at 8-12fps — glossy hair with one airbrushed spec band, gouache backgrounds with brush ridges, and a warm 35mm print-fade with double-exposure halation rings.
worlds.render_law: Direct-to-video Japanese OVA frame in the 1987-1994 lineage — the OVA paradox as production law: every HELD frame is painted to theatrical finish while the MOTION stays limited (8-12fps feel). (1) CEL: confident 2-3px black line over a soft warm-shifted 2-value cel; hair reads as a single glossy mass with ONE airbrushed band of specular light; mouths small and matte; fabric folds densely inked. (2) BACKGROUNDS: gouache on board with visible brush ridges — NOT digital paint — with dense mechanical line detail and airbrushed metal highlights on any machine or prop. (3) OPTICAL ARTIFACTS: bright practicals (window, lamp, neon sign) bloom with double-exposure HALATION RINGS — a period optical-printer artifact, not modern glow — and cast shadows fall as hard diagonal cel shapes. (4) FILM TEXTURE: a visible 35mm grain layer over every frame, warm amber print-fade, slight line/fill mis-registration. (5) CAMERA: static and deliberate — the era held on the cel and let the painting speak. IMPERATIVE: this is a pastiche of the ERA'S production technique and print texture, ORIGINAL designs only, never a specific franchise. Forbid modern digital-clean gradients, sakuga-fluid 24fps motion, HDR bloom, 3D or 2.5D, named characters, or studio logos.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line over soft warm-shifted 2-value cel. Hair a single glossy mass with one airbrushed specular band; small matte mouths; densely inked fabric folds. Slight period-authentic print mis-registration between line and fill.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat 2D, simulated 35-40mm portrait framing typical of period OVA compositions. Static camera bias, minimal reframe. A visible 35mm grain layer and warm print-fade sit over the whole frame.
worlds.camera_grammar: The camera is a period animation stand: a static 35-40mm portrait frame, composed once and held while the cel action and the grain do the moving. Reframing is minimal — a slow pan across a painted background, at most. Nothing pushes, arcs, cranes or creeps. Compose for the held frame: the silhouette must read at rest, because it will be at rest. Never a handheld shake, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Warm practical key, soft warm-shifted cel shadow (hard diagonal shapes, never grey). Any bright practical blooms with a double-exposure halation ring; metal takes one airbrushed highlight band. No modern soft glow — the bloom is an optical-printer ring.

palette_lock.bias: warm film-stock cast throughout — amber print-fade in the highlights, muted desaturated secondary hues, visible grain living in every value step. Shadows are warm-brown, never neutral-grey. NO digital-clean gradient, NO HDR bloom, NO modern clean-cel saturation.

worlds.motion_cadence: Cel silhouette steps forward in deliberate limited-animation frames (8-12fps feel); film grain flutters over each hold; static camera — stillness and grain communicate period weight. 1.5s grain-flutter final hold. Motion is stepped, never fluid.
negative_lock: NO named franchise character, NO specific studio logo or watermark
NO modern digital-clean cel shading, NO HDR bloom, NO 3D or 2.5D render
NO smooth 24fps+ motion — must read as limited-animation stepped
NO cool digital grade — the print is warm-cast
Turkish label only — period-poster-style lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Direct-to-video OVA frame, 1987-94 grammar. Mamilas character at 35mm portrait framing, static hold: 2-3px confident line, warm-shifted 2-value cel, hair a single glossy mass with one airbrushed spec band, small matte mouth. Behind: a gouache-on-board interior with visible brush ridges and a dense-lined original machine with airbrushed metal highlights. A desk lamp blooms with a double-exposure halation ring camera-left; its cast shadow falls as a hard diagonal cel across the wall. Warm amber print-fade, visible 35mm grain, slight line/fill mis-registration. Turkish label 'ANI' in period-poster lettering, upper-left. Motion seed: eyes mid-blink into a held look, grain about to flutter. AVOID: named franchise characters, studio logos, digital-clean gradient, HDR bloom, fluid 24fps, cool grade. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Flat Motion Design — Poster Graphic
worlds.one_liner: Kinetic-poster flatness: solid flat color fills with zero gradient or texture, geometric shapes grid-snapped to precise alignment, 2-3 colors per frame for poster confidence, and a locked orthographic camera where the shape's snap IS the motion.
worlds.render_law: Flat motion-graphics / kinetic-poster design in the modern Saul-Bass-adjacent motion-design lineage. (1) FLATNESS: every element is a solid flat color fill — zero gradient, zero texture, zero simulated 3D shading — pure 2D graphic flatness. (2) GEOMETRY: shapes are geometric-precise (circles, rounded rectangles, exact angles) aligned to an implicit grid. (3) PALETTE: deliberately limited to 2-3 flat colors per frame for poster-level graphic confidence. (4) TYPE: bold geometric sans, grid-locked, when present. (5) SUBJECT: no character faces or organic anatomy — this world is for abstract, brand, and data-visualization subjects, not figures. IMPERATIVE: ABSOLUTE FLAT-COLOR GRAPHIC DISCIPLINE — forbid any gradient, any texture or grain, any 3D or photoreal element, soft-shadow simulation, and organic character anatomy.
worlds.line_grammar: No outline stroke needed — the shape edge is the silhouette itself, precise and vector-clean, no hand-drawn wobble. Where a stroke is used it is a flat solid weight, part of the geometry.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated flat orthographic 2D camera, dead square-on. No depth of field, no lens distortion, no perspective.
worlds.camera_grammar: The camera is an orthographic plate: dead square-on, no perspective, no depth of field, no lens. It never dollies, cranes, arcs, pushes or tilts. Composition is the whole craft — shapes snap to a grid, the poster reads at a glance, one idea owns the frame. Scale contrast and negative space carry the drama, not distance from the subject. Never a perspective or isometric vantage, never a camera move, never a close-up crop that breaks the grid.
worlds.light_law: No directional lighting simulation at all — every flat fill is uniformly lit; value contrast comes only from the chosen flat colors, never from shading or falloff.

palette_lock.bias: flat solid-color fills only — a deep blue-charcoal ground, a warm near-white field, one bold vermilion-orange accent, clean white — a bold two-to-three-color scheme with poster flatness. Value contrast is the flat color choice itself, never shading. NO gradient, NO texture, NO grain, NO soft-shadow, NO more than three active colors.

worlds.motion_cadence: A bold geometric shape snaps to its final grid position; a secondary block slides into alignment; the camera is locked straight-on; no bounce — sharp snap-and-hold; 1s locked final state.
negative_lock: NO bulbous limbless cartoon figures, NO noodle-armed blob people, NO friendly flat-illustration crowd — zero figures of any kind, this world draws systems, not people
NO squiggle-and-blob confetti filler, NO floating decorative dots or sparkle accents, NO isometric hero-illustration clutter — every shape on the grid carries meaning or is absent
NO gradient-mesh soft blend, NO grain or noise overlay passed off as texture, NO drop-shadowed sticker cutout, NO faux-paper cutout shadow — the fill is flat or it is wrong
NO fake-3D isometric extrusion, NO perspective depth of any kind — the plate stays orthographic and dead square-on
NO pastel lavender-and-mint startup palette drift, NO generic infographic clip-art icon — 2-3 poster-confident flat colors, nothing decorative
NO more than 3 flat colors active per frame
NO octane, NO ray tracing, NO photoreal render, NO soft-shadow simulation
Turkish label only — bold grid-locked geometric sans, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Flat motion-graphics poster frame, locked orthographic camera dead square-on — no perspective, no camera move, the grid is the stage. Subject: the fraction one-third taught as pure poster geometry — on a flat deep blue-charcoal ground, a large flat warm near-white circle sits centered on the grid, divided into three equal sectors by two thin flat blue-charcoal seams, and one bold flat vermilion-orange wedge owns exactly one sector while the other two stay near-white; three flat colors in frame and not one more, value contrast doing all the teaching with zero shading. Scale contrast carries the drama: the circle commands the upper two-thirds of the poster, generous negative space everywhere else. Turkish label 'ÜÇTE BİR' in bold grid-locked geometric sans, flat near-white, baseline-snapped to the grid line beneath the circle. Motion seed: the vermilion wedge mid-rotation, a few degrees short of seating into its sector — the half-second before the sharp snap-and-hold. AVOID: bulbous limbless mascot figures, squiggle-and-blob confetti, gradient-mesh blends, grain or noise overlay, drop-shadowed sticker cutouts, isometric extrusion or any fake 3D, pastel startup-palette drift, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Ukiyo-e — Woodblock Print
worlds.one_liner: Japanese woodblock print grammar: flat carved color-fields with no blend, a confident black key-block outline, Prussian-blue dominant over aged cream paper, one red seal-stamp accent, and bold asymmetric wave-motif staging over visible paper grain.
worlds.render_law: Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print in the Hokusai/Hiroshige-adjacent lineage (original composition only). (1) COLOR SEPARATION: flat printed color separation — each color sits in its own hand-carved-feeling flat field, no blended gradient, with a subtle woodgrain-texture bleed at the color-field edges. (2) LINE: a confident black key-block outline with a slightly irregular hand-carved edge quality, never digital-perfect. (3) PALETTE: Prussian-blue dominant with an aged cream-paper base and a single red seal-stamp accent. (4) COMPOSITION: bold graphic flatness with strong asymmetric diagonal or wave-motif staging; deep foreground/background layering achieved through flat color planes rather than photographic perspective. (5) SURFACE: visible paper-grain texture and soft age-toning over the whole print. IMPERATIVE: FLAT PRINTED WOODBLOCK AESTHETIC ONLY — forbid photographic gradient, 3D shading, digital airbrush blending, and modern glossy finish.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident black key-block outline with a slightly irregular hand-carved edge quality, no digital-perfect vector smoothness. Interior form stated by flat color-field boundaries, not by rendered line.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated flat print-plane composition — no camera lens simulated at all; this is a print, not a photographed or rendered scene. Bold asymmetric diagonal staging.
worlds.camera_grammar: There is no camera: this is a printed plane, composed and carved, not photographed. Stage the whole image at once as a flat print-plane. Build depth by stacking flat colour fields, not by moving toward the subject; a bold asymmetric diagonal or wave-motif carries the eye. Nothing dollies, cranes, arcs, pushes or creeps — the composition is fixed the moment the block is cut. Never a simulated lens, never depth of field, never a photographic vantage.
worlds.light_law: No directional lighting simulation — value comes from the flat printed color fields themselves, deepening only at each color-plane's own edge (a printed color-block, not a light falloff).

palette_lock.bias: Prussian-blue and aged-paper-cream dominant, a black woodblock key-line, a single madder-red seal-stamp accent. Color is carved flat pigment on paper, deepening only at plane edges — never a light gradient. NO photographic gradient, NO 3D shading, NO digital airbrush blend, NO modern saturation.

worlds.motion_cadence: A wave or pattern motif flows once across the frame in a single sinusoidal pulse; the Prussian-blue plane darkens once at the pulse's crest; no camera move — the stillness after the pulse is the closing state.
negative_lock: NO direct reproduction of any specific famous historic woodblock print — original composition in the grammar only
NO named ukiyo-e artist signature or seal text
NO photographic gradient, NO 3D render, NO digital airbrush blend
NO modern glossy finish, NO octane, NO ray tracing
Turkish label only — brush-carved woodblock-style lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Ukiyo-e woodblock print frame. Subject: an original wave-motif composition, a Prussian-blue flat printed plane cresting behind a foreground element on aged cream-paper, a confident black key-block outline, a single madder-red seal-stamp accent in the upper corner. Visible paper-grain texture and age-toning over the whole print. Turkish label 'DALGA' in brush-carved woodblock lettering. Motion seed: the wave pulse mid-crest, about to darken and settle. AVOID: reproducing a specific famous historic print, named artist signature, photographic gradient, 3D render, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Laika — Stop-Motion Puppet
worlds.one_liner: Laika stop-motion: physical armature puppets with felted-fabric and silicone-skin micro-texture, genuine miniature sets in macro shallow focus, and a faint per-frame micro-strobe in the fine detail that must never be smoothed into digital tweening.
worlds.render_law: Stop-motion puppet animation in the Laika Studios theatrical lineage (grammar only, not the franchises). (1) PUPPET: every subject is a physical armature puppet with a visible tactile surface — felted fabric, silicone skin with pore-level micro-texture, hand-painted or fabric-sculpted detail, a faint fingerprint or tool-mark trace on soft surfaces. (2) SET: real miniatures — visible practical scale-model texture (the grain of built materials, tiny practical props), shot with genuine depth of field on a macro lens, never a flat digital background. (3) MICRO-STROBE: animation reads as true single-frame stop-motion — a faint per-frame micro-strobe/flicker in fine detail (hair, fabric fringe) from frame-by-frame physical repositioning; this is a FEATURE, never smoothed into digital tweening. (4) LIGHT: practical miniature-set lighting — small hot key lights, real shadow falloff at puppet scale. IMPERATIVE: PHYSICAL-PUPPET TACTILITY ONLY — forbid CG smoothness, digital cel shading, perfectly stable digital-interpolated motion, and flat digital backgrounds.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — physical puppet, not line-based. The silhouette is defined by the sculpted or felted puppet surface itself, a soft practical edge, never a hard vector or ink outline.
worlds.lens_grammar: Macro-to-standard practical lens simulation (35-50mm equivalent at miniature scale), genuine shallow depth of field on the tiny set that betrays its true scale, slight practical lens grain.
worlds.camera_grammar: Shoot the puppets as a real miniature: 35-50mm at genuine shallow depth of field, the camera down at the puppet's own height so the set reads as a world and not a diorama seen from above. Moves are physical dolly moves with a hand's imperfection — a slow creep in, a short lateral track along the set. Let the shallow focus and the tiny scale do the work; hold long enough for the handmade surface to be read. Never a telephoto macro, never a top-down vantage, never a human vantage, never a whip pan, never an interior vantage, never a perfectly smooth virtual move.
worlds.light_law: Small hot practical key lights at puppet scale, real falloff and real shadow softness proportional to the miniature set size. No digital ambient-occlusion fake — shadows come from an actual light-source position on the built set.

palette_lock.bias: warm handmade-material palette — felt, wood, painted resin — earthy tactile tones catching a small hot practical key. Shadow is warm-brown material shadow, never neutral-grey. NO digital-clean saturation, NO CG plastic sheen, NO flat cel color, NO cool digital grade.

worlds.motion_cadence: The puppet moves in true single-frame stop-motion increments — a faint per-frame micro-strobe in fine surface detail (hair, fabric) each hold. One physical gesture per beat, settling into a tactile final hold with a last faint frame-flicker before stillness.
negative_lock: NO Coraline, NO Kubo, NO Norman, NO any named Laika franchise character or creature design
NO CG smoothness, NO digital cel shading, NO perfectly stable interpolated motion — must read as true stop-motion
NO flat digital background — the miniature set must read as physically built
NO octane, NO ray tracing, NO plastic CG skin
Turkish label only — hand-crafted physical-prop lettering (carved, painted, or fabric-appliquéd), NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Laika-lineage stop-motion frame. Subject: an original felted-fabric Mamilas puppet mid-close-up, visible fabric-grain and hand-stitched seam detail, silicone-skin micro-texture on the exposed hands, standing in a genuine miniature set with practical scale-model props in shallow macro depth of field. One small hot key light casts a real falloff shadow across the tactile set floor. Warm handmade palette — felt walnut-browns, a painted copper-resin accent. Turkish label 'MASAL' carved into a tiny wooden sign prop in the background. Motion seed: the puppet mid-gesture, a faint per-frame strobe about to settle into the tactile final hold. AVOID: named Laika characters, CG smoothness, digital cel shading, flat background, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Naruto — Konoha Shinobi World
worlds.one_liner: Studio Pierrot's shinobi grammar: burnt-orange-and-navy utility costume with bandage wraps, Kishimoto paint-block brows, and chakra as an INWARD single-spiral coiling wind-rings around a fist — never an outward aura ball, never a named jutsu.
worlds.render_law: Studio Pierrot television-cel frame in the hidden-village shinobi lineage — confident 2-3px black line, flat 2-3 value cel, warm golden-orange key with deep forest-green secondary. What separates Pierrot-shinobi from every other shounen and MUST be present: (1) COSTUME GRAMMAR — burnt-orange and navy color-blocking, utility flak-vests, forearm bandage wraps, open-toe sandal silhouettes, plain unmarked kunai-class tools. (2) FACE — Kishimoto paint-block brows and hard triangular under-eye shadows. (3) MOVEMENT CULTURE — taijutsu: crouched sprint silhouettes, tree-branch launch poses, body-weight low. (4) CHAKRA — an INWARD single-spiral: it coils tight around a fist or underfoot as concentric wind-rings that lift leaf-litter in a small vortex — NEVER an outward glowing aura sphere, never a named jutsu or hand-sign sequence. (5) ENVIRONMENT — a hidden mountain-forest village: warm wood-and-stone facades, rope bridges, paper seals brushed with Turkish calligraphy, river-stone paths, log training posts, a distant mountain face implied but never carved. Sky stays clear noon-blue or dusk-amber; storm drama belongs to other worlds. Dust hangs in canopy sun-shafts. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL. Forbid outward aura spheres, horizontal face-stretch comedy (that is Toei grammar), 3D or 2.5D, gradient airbrush, cold desaturation.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, uniform weight at rest, a single hard smear frame at the peak of physical effort. Clean silhouette-first design; costume reads by its color-block shapes before its line.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat 2D, simulated 35-50mm portrait for character beats, wider 24mm for training-ground establishing shots. 16:9. No lens flare.
worlds.camera_grammar: 35-50mm portrait for the character beat, a wider 24mm establishing frame for the training ground and the village. One committed camera travel per shot — a low tracking move alongside the run, a rising vantage as the technique gathers — then a held frame for the landing. Frame at the shinobi's own height; the forest and the rooftops stack behind them as layers. Never a handheld shake, never a top-down vantage, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage.
worlds.light_law: Warm golden-orange key — sun through canopy or village lantern — with deep forest-green ambient fill, dust visible in the sun-shafts. The inward chakra spiral, when present, acts as a brief warm rim light coiling inward, never a bloom that floods the frame.

palette_lock.bias: warm golden-orange determination dominant, deep forest-green secondary shadow, warm dust-trail accents catching the canopy light. Shadow is green-brown, warm, never cold-neutral. NO cold desaturation, NO pastel, NO neon, NO storm-grey.

worlds.motion_cadence: Confident hold at rest; taijutsu beats snap with a single smear frame; at climax one inward chakra spiral coils around fist or feet, leaf-litter lifting in the vortex, warm dust trailing; settles into a determined final hold, 1-1.2s. Run-up reads as an arc approach — body low, arms back, dust trailing.
negative_lock: NO Naruto, NO Sasuke, NO Sakura, NO Kakashi, NO Itachi, NO Jiraiya, NO any named Naruto character
NO Hidden Leaf headband symbol, NO Akatsuki cloud-cloak, NO named jutsu hand-sign sequence
NO Valley of the End, NO Hokage Mountain carving, NO named franchise location
NO outward aura sphere — chakra is an inward wind-spiral only
NO Toei horizontal face-stretch comedy
NO cold or desaturated palette, NO pastel, NO 3D, NO gradient airbrush
Turkish label only — bold display letterform, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Studio Pierrot shinobi-world frame. Mamilas character crouched in a sprint pose on a river-stone path, confident 2-3px black outline, burnt-orange-and-navy costume blocking with a utility flak-vest and forearm wraps, Kishimoto paint-block brows set in resolve. Warm golden sun-shafts drop through the canopy with dust hanging; deep forest-green shadow. One inward chakra spiral coils around the raised fist as concentric wind-rings, leaf-litter lifting in the small vortex. Background: wood-and-stone village facades, a rope bridge, log training posts, a paper seal brushed with Turkish calligraphy 'MÜHÜR'. Turkish label 'AZİM' bold display letter, upper-right. Motion seed: the spiral mid-coil, about to tighten. AVOID: Naruto, Sasuke, leaf-headband symbol, jutsu hand-signs, carved mountain face, outward aura ball, face-stretch comedy. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Attack on Titan — Wall World
worlds.one_liner: WIT/MAPPA colossal-wall gravity: near-monochrome grey-green military desaturation, one muted signal-accent (a flare, a cloak trim), the human placed small as a scale indicator against a mass filling 80% of the vertical — stillness IS the tension.
worlds.render_law: Contemporary WIT Studio / MAPPA television-animation frame in the walled-world scale-dread environmental lineage — scale-dread through composition, not motion. (1) ENVIRONMENT: immense stone walls and masses, colossal scale IMPLIED through composition (the wall or architecture filling 70-85% of the vertical frame), never stated as a named specific wall. (2) GRADE: grey-green military desaturation dominates, near-monochrome — all secondary hues pulled toward olive-grey — with exactly ONE muted signal color per composition (a flare, a cloak trim, a single warning light). No warmth, no saturation bloom. (3) CEL: confident 2-3px black line, desaturated 2-3 value cel shading, texture emphasis on WEATHERED stone and coarse fabric over clean color fill; surface weathering and staining baked into the mid-tones. (4) LIGHT: overcast grey-green diffuse ambient key with NO warm bounce; a torch or signal flare is the only local hard source in interiors, reading as a single muted accent against the grey field; shadow is flat and heavy, communicating institutional dread rather than filmic drama. (5) COMPOSITION+MOTION: the human figure small at the base or mid-frame as a scale indicator; near-stillness as the motion grammar with ONE atmospheric shift only (wind through dust, a distant silhouette crossing, a flare igniting); the camera holds — speed never communicates scale, stillness does. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL. Forbid 3D, warm or bright grading, saturation bloom, and any named franchise transformation or emblem.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, desaturated 2-3 value cel shading. Texture emphasis on weathered stone and coarse fabric over clean color; staining and wear baked into mid-tones rather than drawn as separate detail.
worlds.lens_grammar: Wide establishing lens (24-28mm simulated) for scale-dread compositions placing the human as a scale indicator; tighter 50mm for a survival-detail human beat. 16:9 or 2.35:1 for maximum vertical scale impact.
worlds.camera_grammar: Scale is the subject: a wide 24-28mm establishing frame that places a human in it purely as a scale indicator, the wall or the titan filling the vertical. Frame low and look up, or hold wide and let the dread accumulate; a tighter 50mm only for a survival-detail human beat. The camera barely moves: a slow atmospheric drift at most, because speed kills scale. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage, never a human vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Overcast grey-green diffuse ambient key, no warm bounce. A single hard torch or flare is the only local source in interiors, a muted signal-accent against the grey. Shadow reads flat and heavy — dread, not drama.

palette_lock.bias: grey-green military desaturation dominant, near-monochrome, a single muted signal-color accent (a flare, a cloak trim) carrying the only saturation in the frame. NO warmth, NO saturation bloom, NO pastel, NO clean bright fill.

worlds.motion_cadence: Near-stillness; one atmospheric shift only — wind through dust, a distant silhouette crossing, a flare igniting; the camera holds, speed never communicates scale, stillness does. Tension hold 2-3s.
negative_lock: NO Eren, NO Mikasa, NO Levi, NO Armin, NO Erwin, NO any named Attack on Titan character
NO Titan-transformation visual signature, NO Survey Corps wings-of-freedom emblem or insignia
NO named specific wall (Wall Maria, Rose, Sina) — generic colossal wall environment only
NO ODM-gear brand signature
NO warm palette, NO saturation bloom, NO pastel, NO 3D
Turkish label only — military-stencil lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: WIT/MAPPA wall-world frame. Subject: a lone figure in military-style gear standing at the base of an immense grey-green weathered-stone wall, scale-dread composition with the wall filling 80% of the vertical frame, the figure small at the bottom third as a scale indicator. Desaturated grey-green dominant, one muted signal-orange flare glowing at the figure's side — the only saturation in frame. Overcast harsh light, no warm bounce, staining baked into the stone mid-tones. Turkish label 'DUVAR' in military-stencil lettering, small, lower-left. Motion seed: dust drifting across the frame, about to settle into stillness. AVOID: named AoT characters, Titan-transformation, Survey Corps emblem, named wall, warm palette, 3D. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Solo Leveling — Gate Hunter World
worlds.one_liner: MAPPA manhwa-adaptation: razor-sharp angular lines at digital-panel density, cold steel-blue with ONE electric-indigo accent, and the genre's signature translucent SYSTEM WINDOW hanging in air casting glass-blue screen-light on the subject.
worlds.render_law: High-fidelity manhwa-adaptation frame in the modern hunter-and-gate manhwa environmental lineage (grammar only, not the franchise) — razor-sharp angular linework at digital-painted panel density, MORE interior line detail than TV cel. (1) TWO REGISTERS, one declared per frame: a NIGHT-TIME CITY of glass towers with clean cyan-white window grids and wet-asphalt reflections, OR a GATE-DUNGEON interior of rough-hewn stone lit by cold bioluminescent veins in the rock (no torches). (2) GRADE: cold steel-blue and graphite with ONE electric-indigo accent. (3) SIGNATURE — the floating SYSTEM WINDOW: a translucent glass-blue UI panel hanging in air with thin cyan borders and Turkish interface text, casting a faint screen-light on the near side of the subject. (4) COMPOSITION — a POWER-ASCENT ladder: strong verticals, the subject framed low looking up or high looking down, never flat eye-level. (5) THRESHOLD — the Gate exterior exhales a slow purple-black mist mass, a shimmering vertical portal-plane with void beyond. (6) POWER MOMENTS read as ground-particle uplift and a faint violet-indigo silhouette rim — atmosphere, never a named skill. IMPERATIVE: STRICT high-fidelity 2D cel/manhwa shading. Forbid painterly blur and photobash-collage backgrounds (that is jjk_mappa grammar), photoreal 3D, warm-color dominance, and torch-lit fantasy-dungeon cliché.
worlds.line_grammar: Razor-sharp angular linework at high-fidelity density — more interior line than typical TV cel, closer to a digital-painted manhwa panel finish. Edges are clean and hard, not brush-textured.
worlds.lens_grammar: Simulated wide 24-28mm for dungeon-corridor scale, tighter 50mm for a character power-ascent close-up. 16:9 or 2.35:1 for corridor scenes. Strong vertical compositions.
worlds.camera_grammar: Verticality is the drama: a wide 24-28mm looking down a dungeon corridor, or a low frame looking UP at the ascent, the composition stacked top-to-bottom. Tighter 50mm only for the power-ascent close-up, where the aura carves the subject out of the cold. The camera moves once, cold and deliberate — a slow push down the corridor, a rising vantage as the rank breaks. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage, never a warm human vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Cold steel-blue key; bioluminescent rock veins or cyan window grids are the only practicals; electric-indigo accent as rim only. The system window casts a faint glass-blue screen-light on the near side of the subject. No warm fill anywhere.

palette_lock.bias: cold dark-blue and steel-grey dominant, an electric-indigo power-aura as the single accent, cyan window/vein practicals as the only cool highlights. Shadow is blue-black, never warm. NO warmth, NO pastel, NO earth-tone, NO torch-amber.

worlds.motion_cadence: Atmosphere thickens first — ground particles lift; then one rank-aura event, a violet-indigo silhouette outline blooming once; settles into a brooding low-hold, no bounce. The system window fades up cleanly, never snaps.
negative_lock: NO Sung Jin-Woo, NO Cha Hae-In, NO any named Solo Leveling character, NO shadow-soldier army designs
NO named rank/gate classification iconography (S-Rank, E-Rank as franchise branding), NO monarch-aura signature
NO warm palette, NO pastel, NO earth-tone dominance
NO painterly blur, NO photobash-collage background
NO photoreal 3D render, NO torch-lit fantasy-dungeon cliché
Turkish label only — sharp geometric sans lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: High-fidelity manhwa frame, modern hunter-and-gate manhwa environmental lineage (grammar only). Low-angle vertical composition: Mamilas character stands at a Gate threshold, glass towers rising behind with cyan-white window grids over wet asphalt. Razor-sharp angular linework, cold steel-blue palette, one electric-indigo rim accent. A translucent system window floats at shoulder height — glass-blue panel, thin cyan border, Turkish interface text 'GÖREV: BAŞLA' casting a faint screen-light on the jaw. Purple-black mist exhales slowly from the shimmering portal-plane; ground dust begins a faint particle uplift. Turkish label 'YÜKSELİŞ' in cold display type, lower-third. Motion seed: mist mid-exhale, indigo rim about to brighten. AVOID: Sung Jin-Woo, shadow-soldier designs, rank iconography, photobash collage, warm tones, torches. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Bleach — Soul Society World
worlds.one_liner: Studio Pierrot's spirit-world afterlife: stark white-stone fortress architecture against true ink-black spiritual-pressure void, extreme contrast with minimal midtone, one warm amber soul-energy accent — contre-jour courtyards holding tension in stillness.
worlds.render_law: 2D cel-animation frame in the stark spirit-world afterlife environmental lineage — extreme black/white contrast as the core visual law. (1) ENVIRONMENT, three registers: a stark WHITE-STONE fortress-city — clean-cut geometric ashlar walls, tiled roofs, wide empty courtyards, never a named franchise citadel; weathered WOODEN-ALLEY slum quarters outside those walls — low wooden buildings, paper lanterns, dusty paths, never a named franchise district; and an abstract SPIRITUAL-PRESSURE VOID (a formless charcoal-black atmospheric mass with faint white particulate, never a named technique). (2) CONTRAST: confident 2-3px black line, extreme value contrast — true stark-white fields against true ink-black mass, minimal midtone step. (3) ACCENT: a single soul-energy glow in warm orange-amber is the only chromatic event. (4) LIGHT: stark contre-jour or overhead light in the white-stone courtyards — near-blown highlight against ink-black shadow, no soft gradient; warm lantern glow is the only midtone source in the wooden-alley register. (5) COMPOSITION: wide, still courtyards for tension; tight alley framing for intimacy. IMPERATIVE: STRICT PURE 2D CEL with extreme black/white contrast as the governing law. Forbid 3D, painterly gradient, and muddy midtone-heavy grading.
worlds.line_grammar: Confident 2-3px black line, extreme-contrast cel shading — true black and true white with a minimal single midtone step. Architecture reads by hard geometric edges; the void reads by absence of line entirely.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat 2D. Wide static framing for courtyard tension, tighter 35-50mm for alley intimacy. 16:9. No physical DOF.
worlds.camera_grammar: Two registers, one per shot: a wide static frame for the white-stone courtyard, where emptiness and stark contrast carry the tension; or a tighter 35-50mm for the wooden-alley intimacy. The camera holds — this world's drama is contrast and stillness, not travel. Compose the void as a plane of its own: near-black mass against blown white, the subject carved between them. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Stark contre-jour or overhead light in white-stone courtyards — near-blown highlight versus ink-black shadow, no soft gradient. Warm lantern glow is the only midtone source in the wooden-alley scenes. The spiritual-pressure void emits no light; it is negative space.

palette_lock.bias: stark ink-black mass against stark near-white architecture, a single warm soul-energy amber as the only accent. The midtone step is minimal and warm-neutral, never a muddy grey wash. NO muddy midtone dominance, NO pastel, NO cold-blue dominance.

worlds.motion_cadence: Held stillness in the white courtyard; one spiritual-pressure atmospheric mass rises once at the edge of frame, a warm amber energy particle answering; settles into a stark high-contrast final hold, 1.5s.
negative_lock: NO Ichigo, NO Rukia, NO Renji, NO Aizen, NO Byakuya, NO any named Bleach character
NO specific Zanpakutō weapon design, NO Gotei-13 division/squad crest, NO Hollow mask design
NO Soul Society, NO Seireitei, NO Rukongai, NO any named Bleach location
NO muddy midtone-heavy grading, NO pastel, NO cold-blue dominance
NO 3D render, NO painterly gradient
Turkish label only — sharp brush-stroke lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Spirit-world afterlife frame. Subject: a lone figure standing in a vast white-stone courtyard, confident 2-3px black line, stark near-blown warm-white architecture against an ink-black shadow mass rising at the frame edge, one warm amber soul-energy particle glowing beside the figure. Extreme contrast, minimal midtone. Contre-jour overhead light. Turkish label 'RUH' in sharp brush-stroke lettering, small, lower corner. Motion seed: the black atmospheric mass mid-rise, about to settle into a stark hold. AVOID: Ichigo, Rukia, Zanpakutō design, division crest, Hollow mask, muddy midtone, cold-blue. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Cyberpunk Neon Noir
worlds.one_liner: Late-80s theatrical cyber-noir: painted-cel characters over obsessively detailed city plates, crushing blue-blacks cut only by neon signage, wet asphalt answering every source as a second screen, and face-splitting two-tone lighting (cyan fill, magenta rim).
worlds.render_law: Gritty cyberpunk anime-hybrid rendering in the lineage of late-80s theatrical cyber-noir — painted-cel characters over dense, obsessively detailed city plates. (1) BLACKS: deep crushing blue-blacks swallow whole building faces, cut only by neon signage in hot magenta, electric cyan and sodium amber. (2) WET ASPHALT: every street surface is rain-slicked and answers each neon source with a long broken specular streak — the wet ground is this world's second screen. (3) HAZE: volumetric haze hangs at street level so light beams read as solid cones; steam rises from grates and backlights into silhouettes. (4) SKIN: two-tone color splitting — cool cyan fill from ambient signage, hot magenta rim from the nearest sign. (5) TECHNOLOGY: retrofitted and grimy — thick cable bundles, CRT flicker, stickered vending machines — never clean chrome futurism. (6) DEPTH SEPARATION: backgrounds hold painted architectural detail while characters stay simpler cel so they pop forward. (7) POST: mild anamorphic halation around every neon tube, constant fine grain. IMPERATIVE: CYBER-NOIR PAINTED CEL OVER DETAILED CITY PLATE. Forbid bright daylight, clean utopian tech, pastel palettes, photoreal live-action rendering, glossy 3D CGI characters.
worlds.line_grammar: Characters carry a thin dark-toned cel line that dissolves on the shadow side — silhouettes read against neon glow, not against outline. Interior detail lines minimal; cloth folds implied by a two-step cel shadow. City plates are line-dense — painted architectural line-work, signage strokes, cable webs. Neon tubes drawn as a hot near-white core with a colored bloom halo, never a flat colored line.
worlds.lens_grammar: Anamorphic 24mm wide for street establishers with horizontal blue flare on hot sources; 50mm for character work. f/1.8 shallow at close-up so background neon melts into oval anamorphic bokeh discs. Constant fine grain, subtle gate weave. Vertical city shots tilt up into haze that eats the tower tops.
worlds.camera_grammar: Anamorphic 24mm wide for the street establisher, the city compressed and drowning in its own signage; 50mm for character work, shallow enough that the neon melts behind them. Frame low in the wet street or high across the rooftops — the vantage is always somewhere a person could stand, but rarely where they would. One committed move: a slow lateral track past the practicals, a push into the doorway light. Then hold, and let the rain and the sign flicker do the rest. Never a whip pan, never a top-down vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Low-key throughout — base exposure lives in the shadows. The key light is always a diegetic neon or sodium source with a visible origin in or just outside frame. Cyan-blue ambient wash from sky-glow; a magenta or amber rim on the subject's silhouette edge. Default portrait: face half-lit, one eye in light, one in shadow. White light forbidden except a single interrogation-style practical when the beat demands it.

palette_lock.bias: deep blue-black shadow mass carrying most of the frame, a desaturated steel-blue mid, hot magenta neon accent and electric-cyan highlight as the only saturated events — all diegetic sign-light striking wet surfaces. Neon-bright accents are allowed because they are practical sources, not a grade. NO bright daylight, NO clean chrome utopia, NO pastel, NO warm-cozy interior as default.

worlds.motion_cadence: Anime action cadence: 3-4 held frames on poses, then a 2-frame smear burst on impacts. Rain falls constantly at real speed as a depth layer. Neon flickers at irregular intervals. The camera drifts slow and low through streets; one whip-pan maximum per scene. Slow-motion holds reserved for a rain-hit silhouette.
negative_lock: NO Akira identities — NO Kaneda, NO Tetsuo, NO red capsule bike; NO Ghost in the Shell identities — NO Motoko, NO Section 9; NO Blade Runner spinner or Deckard iconography
NO Neo-Tokyo, NO Night City, NO Zaun signage
NO bright daylight, NO clean utopian chrome, NO pastel palette
NO photoreal live-action rendering, NO glossy 3D CGI character
NO earth green, NO warm cozy interior as the default state
NO cosplay, NO realistic skin pores
Turkish label only — neon-sign lettering with a hot core and colored bloom halo, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Cyber-noir painted-cel frame over a dense city plate. Subject: Mamilas character as the guide, mid-shot at a rain-slicked crossing, cyan ambient fill on the camera-left cheek, a hot magenta rim tracing the hood silhouette from a noodle-bar sign off right. Wet asphalt mirrors the sign as a broken vertical streak. Background: layered Turkish signage — 'AÇIK' glowing cyan with a hot white core — cable webs against a haze-eaten tower, a steam column backlit at mid-ground. Anamorphic blue flare kissing the frame edge. Motion seed: a droplet chain about to fall from the hood edge, the sign flicker one frame from cutting out. AVOID: Kaneda bike, Night City, daylight, pastels, English signage, glossy CGI skin. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Vintage Comic Book
worlds.one_liner: 1960s-70s newsprint: visible CMYK halftone rosettes growing into shadow, cyan/magenta plates drifting 1-2px off the black lineart, solid-black ink shadows, bare aged paper as the only white — a page photographed, never a digital drawing.
worlds.render_law: Simulated vintage printed comic in the 1960s-70s newsprint lineage — every frame reads as a page photographed from an AGED comic, never a digital drawing. (1) HALFTONE: midtones and shadows resolve into visible CMYK halftone rosettes — dot size grows into shadow, dissolves toward highlight. (2) MIS-REGISTRATION: print registration is imperfect — cyan and magenta plates drift 1-2px off the black lineart, strongest near panel edges. (3) INK + PAPER: solid black ink owns the deepest shadows and every outline; paper is the only white — aged warm, slightly foxed at the corners. (4) FLAT PLATES: colors are flat plate fills, never gradients — a sky is one cyan plate, a face one flesh plate with red halftone blush. (5) DRAWN DEVICES: speed lines, impact bursts and emanata are physics here. (6) WEATHERING: hairline cracks inside large black fills, tiny ink skips at line ends; a visible panel border with gutter paper allowed when the beat wants it. IMPERATIVE: AGED CMYK NEWSPRINT COMIC. Forbid smooth digital gradients, 3D shading, photoreal texture, clean vector crispness, manga screentone, and anime cel look.
worlds.line_grammar: Thick confident black ink outline with brush-weight variance — heavy on the shadow side and undersides, hairline on the light side. Cross-hatching and feathered hatching carry form shadow before halftone does. Faces get economy lines — a single interior stroke states the nose. All lettering hand-inked.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat graphic staging with forced comic perspective — dramatic low-angle hero shots, extreme foreshortened fists toward camera. No photographic DOF; depth stated by overlap and line density. Panel-composition logic — subjects break the panel border on a strong beat.
worlds.camera_grammar: Every frame is a comic panel: forced perspective, a dramatic low-angle hero vantage, a fist or a foot foreshortened hard toward camera. Depth is stated by overlap and by the shape stack, never by focus — so the vantage must do the storytelling. The camera snaps to its panel and holds; the energy is in the drawing, not the drift. Never a handheld shake, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never a slow neutral documentary hold.
worlds.light_law: Light is a drawing decision: hard-edged graphic shadow shapes in solid black or dense halftone, cast in one stated direction per panel. No soft falloff anywhere. Highlight equals bare paper left unprinted. Night scenes are a blue plate printed over everything with black shadow shapes on top.

palette_lock.bias: warm aged-newsprint paper base carrying the highlights, flat CMYK plate primaries (cyan sky, magenta blush, solid-black ink shadow), a saturated vermilion-red as the hero accent. Color is printed ink, not light — flat plates only. NO smooth gradient, NO desaturated cinematic grade, NO cool digital white.

worlds.motion_cadence: Step-framed pose-to-pose feel: 2-4 stated poses per action with drawn speed-line trails bridging them. Transitions read as panel slides or page turns. Impact frames flash to a single one-color burst plate for one frame.
negative_lock: NO Marvel or DC identities — NO Spider-Man, NO Batman, NO Superman, NO Hulk — NO their logos or masks
NO 3D shading, NO smooth gradient, NO photoreal texture
NO digital vector crispness, NO anti-aliased clean edge
NO modern flat-design minimalism
NO manga screentone, NO anime cel look
Turkish label only — hand-inked comic lettering; speech bubbles and burst shapes with Turkish text allowed, NO English lettering
worlds.example_injection: Aged newsprint comic frame. Subject: Mamilas character as a kid hero in low-angle mid-shot, one arm thrown forward breaking the panel border, flesh tone printed as warm halftone with red-dot blush, heavy black ink on the shadow side of the jaw. The magenta plate drifts 1px off the lineart at the shoulder. Background: one flat cyan sky plate, drawn speed lines converging on the fist, a burst shape behind with 'GÜM!' hand-inked inside. Aged warm paper with a foxed corner, halftone rosettes visible in every midtone, a hairline crack in the large black fill bottom-left. Motion seed: this is the wind-up pose — trailing speed lines already drawn, the next pose implied. AVOID: Spider-Man, Batman logos, gradients, 3D shading, manga screentone, English lettering. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Claymation / Aardman
worlds.one_liner: Aardman plasticine: hand-sculpted clay photographed on a real miniature set, fingerprints and tool marks in the surface, wide expressive mouths and sculpted brow strips as the acting engine, and a true 12fps stop-motion stagger with soft edge-boil.
worlds.render_law: Physical plasticine stop-motion in the Aardman workshop lineage — every character and prop reads as hand-sculpted clay photographed on a real miniature set. (1) SURFACE RECORD: the full tactile record is present — fingerprints pressed into cheeks, tool marks at seams, a faint sheen where a warm thumb smoothed the clay. (2) IMPERFECTION: shapes are softly imperfect — no two eyes exactly level, the mouth re-sculpted between poses so lip shapes vary frame to frame (edge boil). (3) ACTING ENGINE: the wide mouth and heavy brow — huge expressive mouth shapes, eyebrows as separate sculpted clay strips. (4) SET: real-material miniatures — painted cardboard walls, fabric curtains with visibly wrong-scale weave, wire-and-foam trees. (5) LIGHT + PALETTE: warm pigment palette (warm terracotta clay mid, brick-red accent) under soft scaled-down studio light; miniature physics — the depth of field betrays the set's true ~40cm scale. IMPERATIVE: PHOTOGRAPHED MINIATURE PLASTICINE — forbid smooth CGI perfection, digital gloss, 60fps interpolation, real human skin, and drawn outlines or cel shading.
worlds.line_grammar: No drawn lines. Silhouettes carry through physical light on the sculpted form; the seam where two clay colors meet is a real modeled ridge, slightly proud of the surface. Eye highlights are tiny glued beads catching the key light.
worlds.lens_grammar: Macro tabletop photography: 50-60mm at f/2.8-f/4 so the miniature set falls into creamy defocus and betrays its true scale. Camera height at character eye-level, ~20cm off the deck. Gentle push-ins on emotional beats, executed as physical dolly moves with a tiny mechanical imperfection.
worlds.camera_grammar: Camera lives at the character's own eye-level, roughly 20cm off the deck, looking across the miniature set rather than down at it. 50-60mm macro so the set falls into creamy defocus and betrays its true scale. Push-ins on emotional beats, executed as physical dolly moves with a tiny mechanical imperfection — never a flawless virtual glide. Never a top-down vantage, never a wide flat-lay, never a handheld shake, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Scaled-down studio three-point: a soft warm key through diffusion, gentle fill, small practical lamps glowing amber inside the set. Shadows soft-edged and shallow. Thin clay parts pick up a subtle warm translucency — ears glow faintly when backlit.

palette_lock.bias: warm earthy physical-pigment palette — clay-brown shadow, warm terracotta clay mid, brick-red accent, warm cream highlight — under a soft diffused studio key. Colors are mixed pigment in real clay, catching real falloff. NO digital-clean saturation, NO CG plastic gloss, NO cool grade, NO flat cel color.

worlds.motion_cadence: True 12fps stop-motion stagger — motion arrives in discrete sculpted poses, never interpolated. Edges boil softly because the clay is re-handled between frames. Blinks are two-frame lid swaps. Fast actions use sculpted clay smears — an arm stretched into a physical blur shape held for 1-2 frames.
negative_lock: NO Wallace, NO Gromit, NO Shaun the Sheep, NO Feathers McGraw, NO Chicken Run identity
NO smooth 60fps interpolation, NO digital motion blur — only sculpted clay smears
NO perfect CGI surface, NO digital glow, NO photoreal subsurface skin
NO drawn outline, NO cel shading
NO real human hands or scale reference in frame
Turkish label only — sculpted clay letters or hand-painted miniature signs, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Photographed miniature plasticine frame. Subject: a round-cheeked Mamilas clay character at a tiny wooden desk, a thumbprint visible on the left cheek, bead-highlight eyes looking up mid-thought, mouth sculpted into a wide 'o'. Warm diffused key from a window off left, an amber practical desk lamp glowing in-set. Background: a painted cardboard classroom wall falling into creamy macro defocus, a fabric curtain with too-large weave. Sculpted clay letters on the desk edge spell 'FEN' in brick-red. Motion seed: the character's hand hovers one frame from grabbing a clay pencil; edge boil already alive on the sleeve. AVOID: Wallace, Gromit, CGI smoothness, 60fps, drawn outlines, English labels. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Noir High Contrast
worlds.one_liner: 1940s studio noir: pure monochrome chiaroscuro pushed to graphic extremes, whole room-halves dropping to absolute black, one hard motivated source, and venetian-blind slats writing lines of light across a half-lit face through structural smoke.
worlds.render_law: Strict black-and-white photography in the 1940s studio-noir lineage — chiaroscuro pushed to graphic extremes. (1) SHADOW: absolute — whole halves of rooms drop to pure black and stay there; detail is not owed to the audience. (2) HIGHLIGHT: clips gently on wet streets, chrome and eyes. (3) SOURCE: every frame is built around ONE hard motivated source — a desk lamp, a street light through fog, a projector beam. (4) LIGHT AS ENVIRONMENT: venetian-blind slats, stair rails and window frames cast their geometry onto faces and walls — the environment writes lines of light across the subject. (5) ATMOSPHERE: smoke and fog are structural, giving every beam a body. (6) FACE: half-light — a nose shadow splitting the face, one eye socket swallowed whole. (7) TEXTURE: grazing light reveals wet asphalt, wool overcoats, rain-beaded glass; fine silver-halide grain over everything; a deep optical vignette pulls the eye center-frame. IMPERATIVE: HARD-LIGHT MONOCHROME CHIAROSCURO. Forbid color of any kind, soft even lighting, lifted flat midtones, Sin City spot-color, digital cleanliness.
worlds.line_grammar: No drawn lines. Composition is drawn by light itself — blind-slat stripes, doorway light-wedges, silhouette edges against fog glow. A subject may be a pure black cutout against a bright wall and still carry the scene.
worlds.lens_grammar: 35mm and 50mm spherical primes, deep-focus staging front-to-back. Low angles under visible ceilings, dutch tilt on a paranoia beat. Heavy optical vignette, gentle halation on clipped practicals. Rain on the lens allowed as a texture event.
worlds.camera_grammar: Stage front-to-back in deep focus with 35-50mm, the camera low under a visible ceiling so the room presses down on the subject. Light shapes the frame more than any move: hold, and let a slat of light or a passing headlamp do the travelling. A dutch tilt is permitted on a paranoia beat, once, and it must be earned. Never a handheld shake, never a top-down vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: One hard key per scene with a visible or implied diegetic source; fill near zero, ratio never below 8:1. Shadow patterns — blinds, banisters, fences — are the second character in every frame. A rim light separates a black-on-black subject from the void.

palette_lock.bias: pure monochrome, no color tint anywhere. Value is the only language — absolute black shadow, a single mid-grey step, a bright silver accent, clipped white highlight. Contrast is graphic and hard, an 8:1 ratio minimum, with a grain floor always present. NO color, NO sepia wash, NO lifted midtone, NO soft grey fill.

worlds.motion_cadence: Slow and deliberate: creeping dolly moves, long brooding holds while smoke drifts through the beam. Characters move between pools of light, vanishing and re-emerging. A single fast action per scene lands harder against the surrounding stillness.
negative_lock: NO color, NO tint, NO sepia wash
NO soft even lighting, NO lifted flat midtones, NO HDR balance
NO Sin City graphic-novel treatment — no spot color, no white-on-black inversion
NO digital cleanliness — the grain floor is always present
NO modern cars, NO smartphones, NO contemporary streetwear as default
Turkish label only — neon through fog, frosted-glass door lettering, or a newspaper headline, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Hard-light monochrome noir frame. Subject: Mamilas character as a trench-coated figure at an office desk, venetian-blind slats striping the wall and the left half of the face, the right eye socket in full black, cigarette smoke rising into the single hard beam. One clipped highlight lives in the wet eye. Background: a frosted-glass door deep in frame reading 'DEDEKTİF' in reversed letters; the rest of the room swallowed by pure black. Grain floor visible inside the beam, heavy vignette. Motion seed: the smoke column bends as the door handle turns, one frame before it opens. AVOID: any color, sepia, soft fill, Sin City spot color, English signage, digital cleanliness. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Watercolor Storybook
worlds.one_liner: Children's-book watercolor on cold-press paper: washes bleeding wet-into-wet with feathered blooms, a loose pencil underdrawing that the paint drifts off-register from, reserved warm paper as the only highlight, and a shadow mixed as blue-grey wash — never black.
worlds.render_law: Traditional watercolor on cold-press paper in the children's storybook lineage — every frame is a painting whose paper is always felt. (1) WASHES: bleed wet-into-wet at every soft boundary — a sky flows into a hill with a feathered bloom edge; pigment granulates in the valleys of the paper tooth. (2) UNDERDRAWING: a loose pencil underdrawing stays honest and visible, and the color washes drift off-register from it — the paint does not obey the pencil, it converses with it. (3) HIGHLIGHTS: reserved warm paper, never white paint. (4) EDGES do double duty — crisp where the brush ran dry, cauliflower blooms where water pooled. (5) PALETTE: soft and breathable — dusty blue, warm coral, a shadow mixed as a blue-grey wash, never black. (6) FORM + SCALE: objects simplify toward toy-like warmth; scale may gently exaggerate (big moon, small house). White gouache flecks allowed only for stars, snow, dandelion seeds. IMPERATIVE: WET WATERCOLOR ON VISIBLE PAPER — forbid digital gradients, opaque solid fills, hard vector edges, 3D CGI depth, and pure black.
worlds.line_grammar: Loose graphite pencil line, sketchy and searching — two or three light strokes finding a contour rather than one confident line. Ink used sparingly for eyes and tiny details. Lines and washes intentionally misaligned by a few millimeters.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat illustrated staging with gentle atmospheric perspective — distance fades into paler, wetter washes, never photographic blur. Compositions breathe with paper margins; intimate beats float as vignettes on bare white paper.
worlds.camera_grammar: Compose like an illustrated page: the subject small and centred in breathing paper margins, the world washing paler as it recedes. The camera is gentle and almost still — a slow drift across the page, a patient hold while the wash settles. Intimate scale, eye-level with the smallest character in frame, never looming over them. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never a top-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Light lives in pigment density: shadow is a second wet wash dropped over a dry first pass, glowing at its feathered edge. Sunlight is warm paper left bare. No cast-shadow geometry — shadows are soft pooled blobs anchoring the feet.

palette_lock.bias: soft desaturated washes — a mixed blue-grey shadow (never black), dusty-blue mid, warm coral accent, and reserved warm-paper highlight. Pigment granulates in the paper tooth; the darkest value is a wet blue-grey wash. NO opaque solid fill, NO digital gradient ramp, NO hard vector edge, NO pure black, NO saturated primary.

worlds.motion_cadence: Gentle floating motion — elements drift and settle like paper cutouts on water. Transitions dissolve as one wash bleeding into the next. Nothing snaps; every arrival has a soft overshoot and settle. Two-second holds on painted stillness.
negative_lock: NO 3D CGI, NO photographic depth of field
NO opaque solid fill, NO digital gradient ramp, NO hard vector edge
NO black — the darkest value is a mixed blue-grey wash
NO neon, NO saturated primary color
NO Beatrix Potter or known picture-book character identity
Turkish label only — hand-lettered with a fine brush, a slightly wobbly baseline, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Wet watercolor storybook frame on cold-press paper. Subject: a small Mamilas child figure in a warm-coral raincoat under an oversized dusty-blue umbrella, the pencil underdrawing visible and slightly off-register from the paint. The puddle at the boots is one wet wash with a cauliflower bloom edge. Background: a hill bleeding into a rain sky wet-into-wet, a distant house fading to a paler wash, paper tooth granulating across the sky. Reserved-paper highlights along the umbrella rim. Hand-lettered 'BAHAR' floats in the top margin with a wobbly brush baseline. Motion seed: one raindrop ring just opening in the puddle. AVOID: CGI, opaque fills, vector edges, pure black, English lettering. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Sci-Fi Hard Surface
worlds.one_liner: Industrial-design cinema PBR: physically-accurate machine surfaces telling a maintenance history — directional micro-scratches, worn paint at bolt heads, panel-gap AO shadow — under clinical cool-slate light with diegetic cyan LED accents.
worlds.render_law: Photoreal hard-surface CGI in the industrial-design cinema lineage — machinery rendered with physically-accurate PBR discipline. (1) SURFACE HISTORY: every surface tells a maintenance record — brushed metal with directional micro-scratches, fingerprints ghosting on gloss panels, worn paint at bolt heads, panel gaps holding realistic depth shadow. (2) ENGINEERING TRUTH: forms follow believable engineering — chamfers, vents, torx screws, cable routing that could actually exist; greeble density is purposeful, never noise. (3) MATERIAL SEPARATION: materials read honestly under light — anodized aluminum, matte composite, smoked polycarbonate, silicone gasket — each with a correct roughness response. (4) ATMOSPHERE: clinical — cool slate-grey ambient with cyan LED accents and occasional amber warning diodes; thin haze gives depth to hangar-scale spaces. (5) SCALE CUES everywhere — handles, warning decals, wear polished into human touch points. (6) POST: subtle chromatic aberration, gentle filmic ACES rolloff, no bloom abuse. IMPERATIVE: PHYSICALLY-ACCURATE ENGINEERING SURFACES. Forbid organic softness, painterly strokes, stylized characters, fantasy glow-magic, showroom perfection with no wear history, lens-flare abuse.
worlds.line_grammar: No drawn lines. Edges exist as micro-bevels catching specular light — every chamfer is a light-line written by geometry. Panel gaps read as fine dark seams with ambient-occlusion depth.
worlds.lens_grammar: Clean cinema primes: 35mm for machine-scale wides, 85-100mm macro for detail passes with razor-thin focus planes. Precise programmed camera moves (slider, gimbal). Subtle lateral chromatic aberration at the frame edge; zero fisheye, zero handheld.
worlds.camera_grammar: Machine-scale wides at 35mm, then a razor-thin 85-100mm macro pass across the surface — the two scales alternate, never blend. Every move is a programmed, mechanically exact slider or gimbal move; the camera has no hand and no pulse. Frame hardware perpendicular or along its own manufactured axis, so the geometry reads as engineered rather than found. Never a handheld shake, never a whip pan, never a human vantage.
worlds.light_law: Clinical multi-source studio logic: large soft overhead arrays for base exposure, hard small keys raking across surfaces to wake the micro-scratches, LED strips as diegetic accents reflecting in gloss. Cool 6500K base; cyan and amber accents diegetic only. Shadows clean-edged and physically consistent.

palette_lock.bias: cool slate-grey base under a 6500K studio ambient — dark blue-grey shadow, brushed-metal mid, an electric-cyan LED accent (with occasional amber warning diode), cool blue-white highlight. Every accent is a diegetic light source, never a graded tint. NO warm-cozy grade, NO fantasy glow, NO saturated non-diegetic color, NO bloom abuse.

worlds.motion_cadence: Smooth robotic tracking: constant-velocity slider moves, programmed focus pulls landing exactly on the detail beat. Mechanical animation moves with servo precision — ease profiles engineered, not organic. One slow macro drift per scene across a scratched surface.
negative_lock: NO Star Wars iconography, NO Alien / xenomorph, NO Iron Man armor identity
NO organic softness, NO painterly strokes, NO stylized character
NO fantasy glow, NO magic energy effect, NO lens-flare abuse
NO grunge-free showroom perfection — wear history must exist
NO handheld camera shake
Turkish label only — engraved or laser-etched machine labels, warning-decal typography, NO English decals
worlds.example_injection: Photoreal hard-surface frame. Subject: a robotic gripper joint in 100mm macro, a brushed-aluminum knuckle with directional micro-scratches catching a hard raking key from the left, torx screws with worn paint, a silicone gasket seam reading as a fine AO shadow. A cyan LED status strip reflects along the gloss housing; one amber diode blinks near the pivot. Background: hangar depth dissolved in thin cool haze under soft overhead arrays. Laser-etched label 'DİKKAT — SERVO' on the housing. ACES rolloff, subtle edge chromatic aberration. Motion seed: the gripper fingers one servo-tick from closing on a hex bolt. AVOID: xenomorph, Star Wars panels, painterly texture, fantasy glow, English decals, showroom perfection. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Synthwave Retro 80s
worlds.one_liner: VHS-era album-cover futurism in motion: an electric-cyan wireframe grid rushing to a banded gradient sun, chrome as the noble mirror-material, neon edges as the only modeling light, and CRT scanlines with tracking jitter living in the signal.
worlds.render_law: 80s retro-futurist synthwave rendering — the world of VHS-era album covers running in real time. (1) GROUND: a glowing electric-cyan wireframe grid perspective-rushing toward a horizon. (2) SUN: an enormous synthetic sunset holds the horizon — a banded gradient sun, hot pink into deep violet-purple, with horizontal occlusion stripes cut across it. (3) CHROME: the noble material — liquid mirror surfaces reflecting the sunset in warped bands with hairline blue scanline reflections. (4) SOLIDS: silhouette-black or near-black purple — light does not model form here, it OUTLINES it; everything important wears a neon edge; palm trees, mountains and skylines exist as backlit cutouts. (5) SIGNAL TEXTURE: CRT scanlines, slight barrel curvature, VHS tracking jitter at the frame bottom, chroma bleed on hot edges, tape noise living in the blacks. (6) STARS: oversized 4-point glints; bloom is generous and unapologetic. IMPERATIVE: VHS-ERA NEON WIREFRAME RETRO-FUTURISM. Forbid natural daylight environments, muted realism, modern minimal design, photoreal texture, PBR realism.
worlds.line_grammar: Glowing vector lines with a hot near-white core and a colored bloom halo — grid lines, contour outlines, laser horizons. Line weight equals energy. Non-glowing detail lines do not exist: if it matters, it glows.
worlds.lens_grammar: Wide 24mm with slight barrel distortion as default; fisheye allowed for a hero moment. Horizontal anamorphic-style flares off chrome hits. Bloom heavy, halation on every neon core, VHS chroma fringe at high-contrast edges.
worlds.camera_grammar: Wide 24mm by default, the horizon low and the grid running to a vanishing point; a fisheye is permitted for one hero moment. Frame head-on into the sunset or low along the chrome, so every hard edge can throw its anamorphic flare. The camera pushes straight down the grid or holds dead still while the bloom breathes. Never a handheld shake, never a top-down vantage, never a telephoto macro.
worlds.light_law: Anti-physical by law: the sunset gradient is the global light, neon edges are the modeling light, and nothing casts a true shadow — objects anchor by their reflection in the grid floor instead. A pink or cyan rim glow is mandatory on every subject silhouette.

palette_lock.bias: deep violet-black shadow, a dark magenta-purple mid, hot-pink neon accent and electric-cyan highlight — the synthwave triad. Color is pure emissive neon and gradient sunlight, anti-physical, glowing rather than lit. NO natural daylight, NO muted realism, NO pastel-vaporwave drift, NO earth tone.

worlds.motion_cadence: Constant forward drive over the grid toward the sun — the world's default heartbeat. Linear pans and steady zooms; no organic handheld. Chrome reflections slide in counter-motion. One VHS tracking-error hit allowed per scene as a transition.
negative_lock: NO Tron identity — NO lightcycle, NO Tron suit; NO DeLorean; NO Kung Fury cast
NO natural daylight, NO realistic environment, NO muted color
NO photoreal texture, NO PBR realism
NO flat-design minimalism, NO pastel-vaporwave drift — this is synthwave: hot pink, cyan, deep purple
NO organic handheld camera
Turkish label only — chrome extruded lettering with pink neon underglow, 80s logo style, NO English logo
worlds.example_injection: VHS-era synthwave frame. Subject: Mamilas character as a chrome-visored rider silhouette on a black bike, dead-center, a hot-pink rim glow tracing the full silhouette, sunset banding reflected warped across the visor. Ground: a cyan wireframe grid rushing to the horizon, one grid cell pulsing brighter than the rest. Background: an enormous banded gradient sun with occlusion stripes, backlit palm cutouts left and right, oversized 4-point star glints. Chrome extruded letters 'HIZ' float above the horizon with pink neon underglow. CRT scanlines, tracking jitter at the frame bottom. Motion seed: the front wheel one frame from crossing the pulsing grid cell. AVOID: Tron lightcycle, DeLorean, daylight, muted realism, English logo. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Low Poly PS1
worlds.one_liner: Raw 32-bit hardware output: hundreds-of-triangles characters with faces painted on flat texture planes, affine texture-swim warping the floor on every pan, gouraud vertex light, 240p jagged silhouettes, and geometry popping through vertex fog.
worlds.render_law: Authentic 32-bit-era real-time 3D in the PS1 hardware lineage, rendered as if captured from original hardware. (1) POLY BUDGET: brutally low — characters live in the hundreds of triangles, faces painted onto flat texture planes rather than modeled. (2) TEXTURES: tiny (32-64px), nearest-neighbor sampled so every texel is a proud visible square; affine texture mapping warps and swims on floors and walls whenever the camera moves. (3) NO Z-BUFFER POLITENESS: polygons occasionally seam; distant geometry pops in through vertex fog at a hard draw distance. (4) LIGHT: vertex-lit only — light lives at triangle corners and smears across faces as raw gouraud gradients; no cast shadows, characters anchor with a single dark blob decal. (5) COLOR: crushed depth with visible ordered dithering inside every gradient. (6) RASTER: internal 320x240 stretched to frame, jagged un-antialiased polygon edges stair-stepping every silhouette. (7) CHARM: static painted-backdrop-cube sky, chunky low-res texture-font labels. IMPERATIVE: RAW PS1 HARDWARE OUTPUT. Forbid high-resolution textures, smooth per-pixel lighting, modern anti-aliasing, normal maps, HD-remaster polish, softened modern 'PS1-style indie' cleanliness.
worlds.line_grammar: No outlines. Silhouettes are jagged triangle chains stair-stepped by the 240p raster. Character features live entirely in the texture — painted eyes and mouth on flat face polygons, expression changes arriving as texture swaps.
worlds.lens_grammar: Fixed game-camera language: low-FOV tank-camera angles, sudden camera cuts at invisible trigger volumes, or a rigid follow-cam with zero damping. No depth of field — distance handled by vertex fog swallowing geometry at a hard draw distance.
worlds.camera_grammar: This is a game camera, not a film camera: a rigid low-FOV tank angle with zero damping, or a fixed vantage that simply holds while the scene plays inside it. When it does move it is mechanical and undamped — a rigid follow, a hard snap — never an eased, operator-smooth travel. Frame wide enough to read the geometry; the low polygon count IS the subject. Depth comes from the vertex haze, not from focus. Never a handheld shake, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never an interior vantage, never a crane-down vantage.
worlds.light_law: Vertex-lit only: one directional light plus flat ambient, computed at triangle corners and gouraud-smeared across faces. Point lights bloom as radial vertex-color gradients pooled on floors. Full black is impossible; darkness is dithered dark-grey fog.

palette_lock.bias: a limited crushed palette with visible ordered dithering standing in for gradients — near-black shadow (never true black, darkness is dithered fog), flat mid-grey, a hardware-primary green accent, dim highlight. Color banding and dither ARE the aesthetic. NO high-bit smooth gradient, NO HD saturation, NO clean modern grade.

worlds.motion_cadence: Un-interpolated keyframe animation stepping at low sample rates — joints snap between poses. Vertices jitter with fixed-point precision wobble whenever the camera moves. Walk cycles loop visibly. The floor texture swims with affine warp during every pan.
negative_lock: NO Lara Croft, NO Crash Bandicoot, NO Cloud Strife, NO Silent Hill or Resident Evil identity
NO high-res textures, NO texture filtering (no bilinear smoothing)
NO smooth shading beyond gouraud, NO normal maps, NO cast shadows
NO anti-aliasing, NO HD-remaster cleanliness, NO softened modern 'PS1-style indie' look
NO motion blur, NO depth of field
Turkish label only — chunky low-res texture-font with slightly misaligned texels, NO English UI font
worlds.example_injection: Raw PS1 hardware frame at 320x240. Subject: Mamilas character as a low-poly kid explorer (under 500 triangles) standing in a stone corridor, the face painted on a flat texture plane with proud square texels, a single dark blob decal anchoring the boots. Gouraud light from a torch smears orange across the wall triangles; the floor texture visibly swims with affine warp toward the camera. Distant corridor geometry dissolves into grey vertex fog laced with ordered dithering. A chunky texture-font label 'BÖLÜM 1' sits low-left, texels slightly misaligned. The silhouette stair-steps jaggedly against the fog. Motion seed: the character's arm mid-snap between two keyframes, reaching for a lever. AVOID: Lara Croft, texture filtering, cast shadows, HD polish, English UI font. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Rick and Morty — Adult-Swim Sci-Fi
worlds.one_liner: Wobble-line adult sci-fi cartoon: a thin outline that BOILS frame to frame, flat institutional beige-and-olive palette with one radioactive portal-green pop, deadpan-flat staging of cosmic body-grotesque.
worlds.render_law: Adult-swim science-fiction 2D cartoon in the wobble-line deadpan-absurdist lineage. (1) LINE: a thin hand-drawn outline that BOILS — a constant 1-2px line-wobble frame to frame, never clean vector, never uniform; the shaky boil is the signature, not an error. (2) FORMS: economical noodle-limb anatomy, oversized rounded heads, tiny dot pupils, a single wavering unibrow or a bead of drool as the only facial detail; bodies are never anatomically rendered. (3) FILL: flat 1-2 value cel, minimal shading, a limited institutional palette — beige-tan interiors, murky olive, sickly greys — punctuated by ONE radioactive portal-green pop. (4) BACKGROUND: dense deadpan sci-fi gag detail (grotesque alien biology, absurd machinery, wet organic texture) staged FLAT behind the character plane, TV-composited, never atmospheric-cinematic. (5) VORTEX: a portal reads as a swirling FLAT hard-edged green iris, glowing toxic-green, no volumetric depth. (6) TONE: cosmic horror and body-grotesque are staged with dry comic deadpan — the framing stays casual and flat even when the content is monstrous. IMPERATIVE: keep the line BOILING and the palette sickly-institutional with a single toxic-green accent; economical cartoon anatomy, flat TV compositing, deadpan staging. Forbid clean vector line, photoreal or 3D render, painterly brushwork, cinematic atmospheric depth, warm-cozy lift, lush saturated grade.
worlds.line_grammar: Thin 1-2px hand-inked outline with a deliberate frame-to-frame boil — the same contour redrawn slightly differently each frame so the edge shimmers even on a hold. No taper discipline, no clean vector arcs; the wobble is uniform across characters and props. Silhouette reads through economical noodle-limb shape, not detail; interior lines are minimal — one drool bead, one unibrow wave, dot pupils.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flat TV-animation staging at ~35-50mm equivalent, no real lens optics — no bokeh, no lens flare, no depth-of-field falloff. Backgrounds are composited flat behind the character plane. 16:9. Occasional deadpan slow push, otherwise locked; depth is faked by overlap and scale, never by focus or atmosphere.
worlds.camera_grammar: Flat TV-animation staging at 35-50mm equivalent: the character reads against a composited flat background, no real lens between them. The camera is a deadpan witness — it holds the two-shot, it does not chase the joke. A single flat push or a hard cut, nothing more. Frame at conversational eye-level; the comedy lives in the casual, unglamorous vantage. Never a handheld shake, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never a top-down vantage, never an interior vantage.
worlds.light_law: Flat even TV cel lighting — a single ambient fill with a minimal directional key; shading is 1-2 value cel bands, no soft gradients, no volumetric light. The only luminous element is a toxic portal-green glow or a device screen, rendered as a flat hard-edged emissive shape, not a real light source. Shadows are flat shape-shadows, never atmospheric.

palette_lock.bias: Beige-tan, murky olive, toxic green, bone highlight. Sickly deadpan sci-fi flatness with one radioactive green pop. NO lush cinematic grade, NO warm-cozy lift.

worlds.motion_cadence: Limited TV animation on 2s-3s, dialogue-driven snap timing — mouths and gestures pop on the beat, bodies hold flat between. The line boils continuously even on a hold (the shimmer never stops). A portal opens as a single hard flat-green iris, action passes through, then a deadpan settle. No smear-frame heroics — the comedy lives in the flat casual hold.
negative_lock: NO Rick Sanchez, NO Morty Smith, NO Summer, NO Beth, NO Jerry, NO Mr. Meeseeks, NO any named franchise character
NO Council of Ricks, NO Citadel, NO named franchise location or organization
NO portal-gun replica or franchise-specific device design
NO clean vector line (the outline MUST boil/wobble), NO photoreal or 3D render, NO painterly brushwork, NO cinematic atmospheric depth
Turkish label only — hand-lettered wobbling caption, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Adult-swim wobble-line sci-fi cartoon frame.
