Thin boiling 1-2px outline, flat 2-value cel fill, institutional beige-tan lab interior staged flat with dense deadpan machinery gags. Subject: a Mamilas character standing deadpan beside a swirling hard-edged toxic-green portal iris, tiny dot pupils, a single bead of drool, noodle arms; the green glow is the only light pop against the murky-olive room. A worn Türkçe hand-lettered wall sign reads 'DENEY ODASI' in wobbling caps, part of the flat background plate. Motion seed: the portal-green glow pulses once and the bead of drool slides half a centimetre. AVOID: clean vector line, 3D render, cinematic depth, warm grade, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Invincible — Skybound Hero-Comic
worlds.one_liner: Clean-ink superhero comic-book 2D: confident 2-3px line, bright heroic blue-and-yellow primaries and dynamic splash-page foreshortening that ERUPTS into hard-edged saturated blood-crimson at impact.
worlds.render_law: Western superhero comic-book 2D animation in the clean-ink heroic lineage (grammar only, not the franchises). (1) LINE: confident clean comic-book ink outline, consistent 2-3px with a slightly heavier weight on the shadow side; no boil — the discipline is comic clarity, every form legible. (2) FILL: flat cel with 2-3 value cel-shaded bands, hard-edged shadow shapes; saturated bright hero primaries dominate — clean blues, yellows, whites — reading wholesome and heroic. (3) COMPOSITION: dynamic comic-panel staging — low heroic angles, extreme foreshortening on a thrown punch or a flight pose, motion held on the impact frame; composed like a splash page. (4) THE CONTRAST: the signature is the collision of clean bright hero-color with SUDDEN visceral saturated blood-crimson — an impact erupts in hard-edged crimson spray against the wholesome palette; the shock is the tonal whiplash between the two. (5) FACES: clean confident features, few interior lines, expressive but never sketchy. (6) RENDER: 2D flat, no photoreal texture, TV-animation clarity with comic weight. IMPERATIVE: clean confident comic ink, bright heroic primaries, dynamic foreshortened splash-page staging, and — only when the source calls for impact — hard-edged saturated crimson erupting against the clean palette. Forbid boiling/wobble line, photoreal or 3D render, painterly brushwork, muted grunge grade, desaturated grim wash.
worlds.line_grammar: Clean confident comic-book ink outline, consistent 2-3px with heavier weight on the shadow-side contour and under the jaw. No boil, no sketch — every line committed. Interior detail is economical comic shorthand: a few muscle or fold lines, clean facial features. Silhouette reads with splash-page clarity.
worlds.lens_grammar: Comic-panel virtual staging at ~28-50mm equivalent with dramatic foreshortening on action; flat TV-animation depth, no real bokeh. 16:9 composed like a comic splash. Motion lines and impact framing are allowed as graphic elements, never photographic blur.
worlds.camera_grammar: Comic splash-page staging at 28-50mm: the action foreshortened hard toward camera, the frame composed as a panel that could be printed. A big committed vantage per shot — a low hero angle for the launch, a steep drop for the landing — held on the impact frame. Flat TV-animation depth; motion lines are graphic elements, so the camera itself stays composed and still. Never a handheld shake, never a shallow-focus bokeh vantage, never an interior vantage.
worlds.light_law: Cel-shaded hero lighting — a clear directional key carves 2-3 hard-edged value bands, bright bounce keeps the heroic colors luminous, a deep shadow shape holds the off-side. Impact moments add a hard crimson emissive spray. No soft photoreal gradient, no volumetric haze — light is graphic and legible.

palette_lock.bias: Hero blue, bright yellow, crimson impact, clean white. Wholesome comic clarity that erupts into saturated blood-red. NO muted grunge, NO desaturated grim grade.

worlds.motion_cadence: TV animation on 2s with full-animation bursts at the hero beat — anticipation, one big committed action (a flight launch, a landed punch), impact held on a strong foreshortened frame. Impact erupts in a single hard crimson spray-frame, then a confident settle. Speed and motion lines are drawn as graphic comic elements, never motion blur.
negative_lock: NO Mark Grayson, NO Omni-Man, NO Atom Eve, NO Allen the Alien, NO Nolan, NO any named franchise character
NO named franchise team, costume emblem, or logo
NO named franchise planet or location
NO photoreal render, NO 3D CG, NO painterly brushwork, NO boiling/wobble line
Turkish label only — clean comic caption lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Western superhero comic-book animation frame. Clean 2-3px comic ink, 3-value cel shading, bright heroic blue-and-yellow palette, dynamic low heroic angle with foreshortening. Subject: a Mamilas character in an original blue-and-yellow suit launching upward off an İstanbul rooftop mid-flight, one arm extended in a committed splash-page pose, clean confident features. A Türkçe rooftop sign reads 'KADIKÖY' in clean comic caps, baked into the background plate. Motion seed: the cape-edge and one hand snap upward half a frame as the launch begins. AVOID: wobble line, 3D render, painterly wash, grim desaturated grade, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Castlevania — Powerhouse Gothic
worlds.one_liner: Gothic dark-fantasy action animation: refined anime-influenced character ink over painterly candlelit gothic backgrounds, deep chiaroscuro of cold slate-and-black with warm amber, one blood-crimson accent, and weighted sakuga combat.
worlds.render_law: Gothic dark-fantasy action-animation in the painterly-lit anime-western hybrid lineage (grammar only, not the franchises). (1) LINE: refined thin ink outline, 1-2px, clean and detailed on characters with sharp anime-influenced features, set OVER painterly digital backgrounds (never flat cel behind). (2) BACKGROUND: richly painted gothic architecture — cathedral vaults, candlelit stone, wrought iron, moonlit ruin — with brush texture and atmospheric depth; the environment carries the dread. (3) LIGHT: dramatic chiaroscuro — a single warm candle or cold moon source, deep near-black shadow absorption, warm amber pools against cold blue-black dark; faces and blades catch a rim of light out of heavy shadow. (4) COLOR: a desaturated gothic base — cold slate-blues, blacks, stone-greys, warm candle-amber — with ONE saturated blood-crimson accent reserved for violence. (5) ACTION: fluid sakuga-quality combat bursts (a whip arc, a spell, a blade) with real weight and follow-through, held on a strong pose. (6) FACES: detailed anime-influenced, expressive, refined line. IMPERATIVE: refined character ink over painterly gothic backgrounds, dramatic candle/moon chiaroscuro, a desaturated cold-and-amber palette with a single blood-crimson accent, weighted sakuga action. Forbid flat cel backgrounds, bright saturated palette, flat even lighting, photoreal render, wobble/boil line.
worlds.line_grammar: Refined thin ink outline, 1-2px, clean and controlled on characters with sharp anime-influenced facial structure and detailed costume linework. The character line sits over PAINTED backgrounds — the environment has no drawn outline, only brush-rendered form and atmosphere. Silhouette reads via chiaroscuro edge, not a heavy contour.
worlds.lens_grammar: Anime staging at 35-85mm equivalent with real depth — atmospheric background falloff, candlelit haze, gothic wide vistas and tight action inserts. 16:9, or a 2.39-feel for vistas. Shallow focus is allowed on a face against a painted deep background.
worlds.camera_grammar: Two framings, one per shot: a gothic WIDE VISTA that lets the architecture and the dark carry the dread, or a TIGHT INSERT on the decisive gesture — a blade, a hand, a face out of the shadow. Nothing in between; the middle distance is where this world goes flat. Camera moves are slow, weighted and motivated — a crane-down through the vault, a deliberate push into the candle pool, a hold that lets the shadow do the work. Shallow focus is allowed on a face against a painted deep background. Never handheld, never a whip pan, never a neutral documentary vantage.
worlds.light_law: A single dramatic motivated source — a candle, a torch, a shaft of cold moonlight — with deep chiaroscuro: near-black shadow absorption holds most of the frame while a warm amber pool or cold blue rim carves the subject out of the dark. Blades and eyes catch a hard specular. A blood-crimson glow appears only at violence. Never flat, never evenly filled.

palette_lock.bias: Slate-blue, near-black shadow, blood-crimson accent, candle-amber highlight. Chiaroscuro dark-fantasy shadow absorption. NO flat even light, NO bright saturated palette.

worlds.motion_cadence: Deliberate atmospheric stillness punctuated by fluid full-animation sakuga bursts — a whip arc or spell resolves in weighted, followed-through frames, then holds on a strong dramatic pose 24-36 frames while candlelight and cloth settle. A blood accent snaps on the impact frame. Stillness carries gothic dread; the sakuga burst carries the violence.
negative_lock: NO Trevor Belmont, NO Alucard, NO Sypha, NO Dracula, NO Lisa, NO Isaac, NO Hector, NO any named franchise character
NO Belmont whip, Vampire Killer, or named franchise weapon/relic design
NO named franchise castle, Wallachia, or location
NO flat cel background (backgrounds MUST be painterly), NO bright saturated grade, NO flat even lighting, NO photoreal render
Turkish label only — gothic engraved lettering, NO English signage
worlds.example_injection: Gothic dark-fantasy action-animation frame. Refined 1-2px character ink over a painterly candlelit cathedral interior, deep chiaroscuro, cold slate-and-black dark with a warm amber candle pool. Subject: a cloaked Mamilas character on İstanbul old-city stone steps at night, a single lantern carving a warm rim out of near-black shadow, sharp anime-influenced features, one blood-crimson glint on a blade edge. A Türkçe engraved stone plaque reads 'SUR KAPISI' in gothic caps, painted into the background. Motion seed: the lantern flame flickers once and the cloak-hem settles a few centimetres. AVOID: flat cel background, bright saturated palette, flat even light, photoreal render, English signage. Clean motion-ready start frame.

worlds.name: Aspirational Education Commercial — Photoreal Institutional
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal Turkish education advertising: motivated honest light where real fixtures — LED panels, smartboard glow, desk lamps — are welcome alongside window daylight, flattering 35–85mm commercial optics on credible aspirational students and teachers, with the register (warm-trust intimacy, clean high-key prestige, or single-hard-source determination) set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day choice.
worlds.render_law: Premium aspirational education/institutional commercial cinematography — the visual language of high-end course, college and exam-prep promos, built to flatter and persuade while staying physically honest. (1) LIGHT SOURCE — motivated and honest: window daylight serves as the soft key, and real visible fixtures are ALLOWED and encouraged — overhead LED/fluorescent ceiling panels as soft even ambient, smartboard/projector glow as a cool secondary wash, warm desk and reading lamps as practicals; fill is soft and flattering (bounce/softbox-equivalent lift into shadows) — the exact OPPOSITE of naturalist negative-fill; every source must exist in the scene and behave physically. (2) REGISTER is palette-driven, never fixed: the same room renders as warm-key intimate trust, as clean high-key premium prestige, or as a single hard-source determination frame (one desk lamp against night), depending solely on the selected palette and time — this law fixes the physics foundation, not the mood. (3) CAMERA — controlled and intentional but alive: smooth motivated dolly and glide moves, gentle push-ins on faces and on product hero, clean locked frames for graphic/stat shots, occasional warm handheld for student intimacy; never a constant handheld weave, never dead-corporate stiffness. (4) LENS — flattering commercial primes at 35mm, 50mm and 85mm; medium-to-shallow depth of field is ALLOWED for hero and face isolation, deep focus is allowed for environment establishing — the owner chooses per shot; falloff must be real optical behavior, never fake AI bokeh painted behind a cutout. (5) TEXTURE — clean modern digital-cinema rendering with real skin micro-texture, fabric weave, paper grain on books and worksheets; optional fine natural film-style grain; zero plastic AI smoothing, zero stock-photo gloss. (6) SUBJECT TRUTH — credible aspirational Turkish students and teachers with genuine study behavior: writing, solving, listening, a real moment of understanding; aspiration is carried by light and composition, never by frozen fake-diverse stock cheese. IMPERATIVE: light the truth of the room — window, panel, screen and lamp all honest and all flattering — and let the owner's palette decide whether it whispers warmth, gleams prestige, or burns late-night resolve. Forbid plastic AI skin, teal-orange grade, stock-photo fake smiles, English signage, banning of real fixtures (the naturalist no-artificial-light dogma does not apply here), oversaturated ad gloss, and imitation of any film-auteur signature.
worlds.line_grammar: N/A — photoreal. Clean digital-cinema edge definition with real micro-contrast; no illustration line, no outline, no cel logic anywhere. Skin holds sub-pixel pore and texture detail under any grain level; text on books, boards and posters resolves as real printed or projected matter with true edge softness from the lens, never as pasted vector overlay.
worlds.lens_grammar: Flattering commercial primes: 35mm for environment and group coverage, 50mm for natural human presence, 85mm for hero face and product isolation. Medium-to-shallow depth of field (f/2.0–f/2.8) for hero isolation with real optical falloff; deep focus (f/5.6–f/8) for establishing frames of classroom, corridor, library or lab. Delivered 16:9 by default; a vertical reels delivery recomposes the frame to portrait. Clean modern lens coating; controlled, believable flare only from real practicals in frame (a desk lamp, a projector beam), never decorative anamorphic streaks. Optional fine natural grain over the clean digital negative.
worlds.camera_grammar: Controlled commercial coverage that stays alive: smooth motivated dolly and glide moves through desks and shelves, gentle push-ins that land on a face at the moment of understanding or on the product hero (book cover, result screen, stat card), clean locked frames for graphic and product shots, and occasional warm handheld for close student intimacy — a hand writing, a page turning. The default vantage is head-height human eye-line, supplemented by flattering low-quarter angles for prestige architecture and tabletop hero angles for product. Never a constant handheld weave, never a top-down surveillance vantage.
worlds.light_law: Motivated and flattering. Window daylight is the default soft key; real fixtures are allowed and visible — overhead LED/fluorescent panels give soft even ambient, smartboard and projector glow give a cool secondary wash on faces, warm desk and reading lamps act as practicals and night keys. Shadows are lifted with soft flattering commercial fill (bounce/softbox-equivalent), never crushed with naturalist negative-fill; darkness is shaped for appeal, not for documentary grit. The register — warm intimate key, clean high-key prestige, or single hard desk-lamp source against night — is chosen entirely by the selected palette and time-of-day, on top of this fixed physical foundation.

palette_lock.bias: warm, credible, institutional, daylight. soft window key lifted by flattering practical fill, gold accent held in lamps and printed matter, natural skin rendering. NO teal-orange, NO plastic gloss, NO oversaturation.

worlds.motion_cadence: Real-time 24fps photoreal motion — true motion blur, no animation smear or held frames. Camera moves are smooth and motivated: slow dolly glides, gentle push-ins that ease to a stop. Subjects carry small living micro-motion — breathing, a pen stroke, a page settling, eyes tracking a board. Product and graphic frames may be fully locked or carry a single slow push; nothing floats, nothing loops, nothing snaps.
negative_lock: NO named real schools, universities, brands or logos — original/unbranded institutions only
NO English signage — Turkish label only, naturalistic and integrated into the real environment

worlds.example_injection: Photoreal premium education-commercial cinematography. A Mamilas character — a 17-year-old Turkish student, dark hair tied back, sleeves pushed up, genuinely mid-solution over an open soru bankası — at a third-row desk in an İstanbul dershane classroom late afternoon. worlds.name: Kurumsal Brand Film — Photoreal Corporate Commercial
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal Turkish corporate brand-film advertising: architectural window daylight and honest visible practicals over glass, steel and concrete, slow gimbal glides and locked symmetric frames on credible professionals at genuine work, 24–85mm commercial primes, with a cool neutral grade carrying a single restrained brand accent whose register — cool dawn, daylight or dusk — is set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day choice.
worlds.render_law: Premium corporate brand-film cinematography — the craft lineage of high-end institutional image spots from top commercial production houses: architecture, people and work rendered with restraint — physically honest light and an unhurried, deliberately paced camera. (1) LIGHT SOURCE — motivated and architectural: floor-to-ceiling window daylight is the default soft key with direction honest to the building's orientation; visible practicals are ALLOWED and encouraged — linear LED strips and recessed downlights as even ambient, monitor and lobby-screen glow as cool secondary washes on faces; fill is soft and controlled (bounce/softbox-equivalent, shadow side held roughly two stops under key), and every source must exist in the scene and behave physically. (2) SURFACE TRUTH — glass, brushed steel, concrete and wood carry real reflectance: speculars obey angle of incidence, window reflections stay geometrically coherent, concrete holds its pour grain, fabric holds weave; zero plastic smoothing on skin or material. (3) CAMERA — slow gimbal glides at an unhurried walking pace, locked symmetric frames for architecture and hero objects, gentle push-ins that ease to a full stop on a face at a decision moment; never a handheld weave, never a whip pan. (4) LENS — commercial primes at 24mm, 35mm, 50mm and 85mm; shallow depth of field (f/2.0–f/2.8) for face and hero isolation with true optical falloff, deep focus (f/8) for architectural establishing frames; falloff is real lens behavior, never painted blur. (5) GRADE — cool neutral grade with a single restrained brand accent living only in honest surfaces (a wall panel, a lanyard, a screen header), skin tones protected and natural; the register — cool dawn, neutral daylight or warm dusk — is set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day on top of this fixed physical foundation. (6) SUBJECT TRUTH — credible Turkish professionals at genuine work: a real meeting mid-sentence, hands adjusting a prototype, a decision landing on a face; confidence is carried by light, geometry and pace, never by staged handshake theatre. IMPERATIVE: render institutional confidence as physics — honest architectural light, coherent reflections and an unhurried camera — and let the owner's palette alone decide whether the building reads cool dawn, neutral midday or warm dusk. Forbid plastic AI skin, teal-orange grade, stock-photo handshake theatre, English signage, floating overlay text, drone-epic skyline clichés, oversaturated ad gloss, and imitation of any film-auteur signature.

Shallow depth of field (f/2.0–f/2.8) allowed for face and hero isolation with real optical falloff; deep focus (f/8) for architectural establishing frames where glass reflections and structural lines must stay resolved. Native 16:9 delivery. Modern clean lens coatings; flare only as a controlled veil from real in-frame sources — a window sun-hit, a lobby screen — never decorative anamorphic streaks. Optional fine grain over the clean digital negative.
worlds.camera_grammar: Slow, steady coverage: gimbal glides at unhurried walking pace through lobbies, corridors and open workspaces; locked tripod frames for symmetric architectural compositions and product/stat hero shots; gentle push-ins that ease to a full stop on a face at a decision moment or on the hero object. Default vantage is head-height human eye-line, with measured low-quarter angles reserved for architecture and scale. Never a handheld weave, never a whip pan, never a top-down surveillance vantage.
worlds.light_law: Motivated and architectural. The register — cool dawn, neutral daylight, or warm dusk — is chosen entirely by the selected palette and time-of-day on top of this fixed physical foundation.

worlds.name: Civic & National-Day Commercial — Photoreal Public Ceremony
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal Turkish national-day and public-service advertising: real directional sun over flags, schoolyards, squares and generic monuments, honest institutional fixtures indoors, 35–135mm broadcast primes holding a single un-staged proud face or a wide crowd, with the register — warm-proud dawn, solemn overcast, or bright civic midday — set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day choice.
worlds.render_law: Turkish national-day and public-service broadcast advertising — the register of state-ceremony and civic films, where real people, flags, squares and generic monuments are shot on honest motivated light and pride is carried by real sun and un-staged faces rather than by grade tricks or staged patriotism. (1) LIGHT SOURCE — motivated and honest: outdoor scenes run on real directional sun (low golden dawn or dusk raking across asphalt and stone, or flat overcast for a solemn even key), and indoor municipality scenes use visible institutional fixtures — ceiling LED and fluorescent panels, counter lamps, hall lighting — as real ambient; fill is a soft bounce roughly two stops under key so shadow sides stay open, never crushed and never blown out. (2) SUBJECT TRUTH — real Turkish citizens, children, elders and veterans in un-staged posture: a child mid-recital, a veteran's steady salute, a citizen at a service counter; skin and wool-felt uniforms hold real micro-texture, no plastic smoothing, no forced grin. (3) FLAGS AND CLOTH physics: flag-cloth catches real wind and shows weave and wear, hanging or lifting with true mass; bronze and weathered stone on monuments carry honest specular and patina under the stated sun angle. (4) CAMERA — steady and motivated: dolly and slow crane for the scale of a square, a crowd or a monument; locked frames at a child's or citizen's eye-height for a face; wide establishing for the mass of flags; measured low angles for a flag or monument against sky. (5) LENS — broadcast primes: 35mm for square and crowd context, 50mm for a single figure, 85–135mm to compress a mass of flags or a crowd and isolate one face; deep focus at f/8 for ceremonial scale, shallow at f/2.0–f/2.8 for one face, with real optical falloff. (6) TEXTURE — clean broadcast digital-cinema with real skin, cloth weave, stone and bronze; optional fine grain; zero plastic AI skin, zero stock gloss. IMPERATIVE: render civic feeling as physics — real directional sun, honest fixtures, flag-cloth with true mass, un-staged faces — and let the palette set warm-proud dawn, solemn overcast, or bright civic midday. Forbid plastic AI skin, teal-orange grade, oversaturated flag-waving, staged patriotic grins, English signage, floating overlay text, and imitation of any film-auteur signature.

worlds.name: Appetite Tabletop Commercial — Photoreal Product Hero
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal Turkish food-and-beverage tabletop advertising: a single low raking key that skims crumb, steam and condensation as backlit volume, 100mm macro and 50mm context primes at honest shallow planes, real liquid viscosity and surface truth on the hero product, with hands entering only to pour, tear or lift — the register (warm morning bakery or cool late-night çay) set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day choice.
worlds.render_law: Appetite-appeal tabletop and food-hero commercial cinematography — the craft lineage of high-end culinary advertising studios, where a single dish or drink is staged and lit like a leading actor and appetite is triggered by real physics, never by grade tricks. (1) LIGHT SOURCE — one low raking key: a single soft key placed behind or beside the subject at 15–35° elevation so it skims across surfaces, revealing crumb structure, sesame relief, condensation beads and rising steam as backlit volume; fill is a modest bounce lift roughly two stops under the key so shadow sides stay open but dimensional; every highlight must be a real specular event on a real wet or glossy surface. (2) SURFACE TRUTH — texture is the hero: bread shows open crumb and crust blistering, tea and coffee show true meniscus and surface bloom, syrup and oil sheet and cling with real viscosity, china, copper and glass carry honest reflections of the actual set; zero wax-fake food, zero painted-on gloss. (3) STEAM AND ACTION physics: steam rises as thin backlit wisps that shear and thin naturally, pours arc and settle with real liquid mass, a tear or break releases visible moisture; nothing suspends against gravity, nothing floats. (4) CAMERA — locked and deliberate: tabletop hero angles between 10° and 45° above the surface, slow slider drifts under 5cm of travel, gentle rack focus between foreground garnish and hero; the frame is composed and lit like a still life. (5) LENS — 100mm macro for texture heroes at f/4–f/5.6, 50mm for table context at f/2.8; focus falloff is real optical behavior on an honest shallow plane, never fake painted blur behind a cutout. (6) HUMAN PRESENCE is partial and serving: real hands with natural skin texture enter to pour, tear, sprinkle or lift; faces, when present, stay soft in background falloff — the product owns the sharp plane. IMPERATIVE: trigger appetite through physics — raking light, real steam, true viscosity — and let the owner's palette decide whether the table reads warm morning bakery or cool late-night çay. Forbid wax-fake food, painted gloss, floating garnish, teal-orange grade, plastic AI smoothing, English signage, and imitation of any film-auteur signature.

No outline, no cel logic, no vector edge anywhere. Printed matter on bags, menus and labels resolves as real ink on real paper with true lens-edge softness, never as pasted overlay.

Clean modern coating; flare only as a soft bloom from a real backlit steam or window source in frame, never decorative streaks. Optional fine natural grain over the clean digital negative.
worlds.camera_grammar: Locked, deliberate tabletop coverage: hero angles between 10° and 45° above the surface, slow slider drifts under 5cm of travel that ease to a full stop, gentle push-ins that land on the product at the moment of action — the tear, the pour, the first steam. Locked tripod hold is the default for texture macro frames; hands enter and exit a stable frame. Never a handheld weave, never a whip pan, never a top-down flat-lay vantage — the product is met at its own height, like a portrait sitter.

The register — warm bakery morning, neutral studio counter, or cool late-night çay — is chosen entirely by the selected palette and time-of-day, on top of this fixed raking-key foundation.

worlds.name: Product & Brand Commercial — Photoreal Hero Object
worlds.one_liner: Photoreal Turkish product and brand advertising: a hero object staged and lit like a leading actor on controlled commercial light, honest surface truth on glass, metal and matte, 50–100mm primes with 100mm macro detail, with the register — clean bright-white, luxury dark-field, or warm lifestyle window — set entirely by the owner's palette and time-of-day choice.
worlds.render_law: Turkish product and brand advertising — the register of the hero-object commercial, where a single product is staged and lit like a leading actor and desire is built from real surface physics rather than grade tricks. (1) LIGHT SOURCE — controlled and flattering: a softbox or gradient key shapes the product's form, a fill about one to two stops under key opens the shadow side, and a rim or kicker separates the object from its background; every highlight is a real specular event on the product's actual surface. (2) SURFACE TRUTH — material reflectance is the hero: glass refracts and carries honest caustics, brushed metal shows directional anisotropy, matte plastic and paper hold microtexture, cream and liquid sheet with real viscosity; nothing wax-fake, no gloss beyond the product's real finish. (3) BACKGROUND AND SET — a seamless sweep for clean isolation, a dark field for a sculpted single-highlight look, or a real Turkish home or desk under window light for lifestyle context; reflections in the set stay geometrically coherent. (4) CAMERA — locked and precise: tabletop and eye-level hero angles, a slow slider under a few centimetres or a turntable under a few degrees, a macro push-in that eases to a full stop on the detail that sells; a real hand may enter to lift, open or demonstrate. (5) LENS — 50mm for context, 85mm and 100mm for the hero, 100mm macro for material detail; depth of field is shallow but honest, f/4–f/8 for product sharpness and f/2.8 for a soft context, with real optical falloff. (6) TEXTURE — clean digital-cinema with real material microtexture and honest reflections; optional fine grain; zero plastic AI smoothing, zero painted gloss. IMPERATIVE: build desire from real surface physics — controlled key, honest specular, true material reflectance — and let the palette set clean bright-white, luxury dark-field, or warm lifestyle window. Forbid wax-fake surfaces, painted gloss, teal-orange grade, plastic AI smoothing, English signage, floating overlay text, and imitation of any film-auteur signature.
